On a held-out month-wide slice of Lichess Rated Blitz games ChessMimic's human move prediction accuracy outperforms Maia-2 in every Elo band. Compared to Maia-3, our 9M parameter model's accuracy sits between Maia-3-5M and Maia-3-23M without the additional complexity of Geometric Attention Bias. In addition to the move matching model, we also train a game outcome model that conditions not only on the position, but also player ratings, time control, and remaining clock times. The outcome model achieves an AUC of 0.78 out of sample, beating Maia-2 as well as logistic regressions based on material, ratings, and clock time. Finally, we train a clock model that predicts human thinking times. The clock model provides a usable but non-SOTA per-ply think-time signal under ALLIE-style filters (Pearson r = 0.41, Spearman rho = 0.50, MAE 4.10 s, against ALLIE's reported r = 0.70), with the residual gap concentrated in per-position bucket sharpness rather than bucket-marginal calibration. A public demo is at 1e4.ai and we release code, per-band weights, and the C++ data-filter pipeline code in GitHub.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ChessMimic系统，通过分评级带的三个小型Transformer模型预测人类棋手落子、思考时间和对局结果。
light_analysis.motivation: 在线国际象棋中，人类棋手的行为因技能水平差异显著，现有模型如Maia-2和Maia-3在跨评级带预测时精度不足。Maia-3虽利用几何注意力偏置提升性能，但参数效率有限。ChessMimic旨在通过每100 Elo评级带独立训练模型，实现更精准的逐级校准，同时保持小参数量。
light_analysis.method: 构建三个编码器-only Transformer模型：落子预测、思考时间预测和对局结果预测。每个模型按100 Elo评级带分别训练，共覆盖多个区间。输入包括棋局位置、近期走法历史、玩家评级和时钟状态。落子预测模型9M参数，结果模型额外利用玩家评级、时间控制和剩余时钟，时钟模型预测思考时间。使用Lichess数据，代码和权重开源。
light_analysis.result: 落子预测准确率在所有Elo带上优于Maia-2，且9M参数模型性能介于Maia-3-5M和Maia-3-23M之间。结果模型AUC达0.78，超过Maia-2和基于材料、评级、时钟的逻辑回归。时钟模型在ALLIE风格滤波下Pearson r=0.41，Spearman rho=0.50，MAE 4.10秒，虽非最优但提供可用信号。
light_analysis.conclusion: ChessMimic展示了分评级带条件建模在国际象棋行为预测中的有效性，以较小参数取得与复杂方法相当的性能。其开源实现和演示便于部署及应用，未来可探索跨带共享知识或改进时钟模型精度。

title: Adaptive Calibration for Fair and Performant Facial Recognition
abstract: We introduce Adaptive Calibration (AC), a novel calibration strategy for facial recognition that maps cosine similarity between normalized embeddings to well-calibrated probabilities. By incorporating local context into calibration, Adaptive Calibration corrects for a fundamental mismatch in cosine similarity, whereby the same distance can correspond to different match probabilities in different embedding regions. Our approach improves both overall performance and results in a fairer calibration without requiring demographic metadata.   Our approach consistently dominates existing methods both on accuracy and fairness metrics across a variety of pretrained models and standard benchmarks. AC provides a practical solution for equitable facial recognition, without requiring demographic group annotations, and while improving overall performance. Unlike existing approaches, our method provides continuous, region-specific calibration that avoids "leveling down" where fairness comes at the cost of degraded performance for some groups.

light_analysis.overview: 提出自适应校准方法，通过局部上下文校准余弦相似度，提升人脸识别的性能与公平性。
light_analysis.motivation: 人脸识别中，余弦相似度存在根本性不匹配：相同距离在不同嵌入区域对应不同匹配概率。现有校准方法忽略局部上下文，可能导致不公平且性能下降。需要一种既能提升整体性能又能实现公平校准的方法，且不依赖人口统计元数据。
light_analysis.method: 提出自适应校准（AC），将归一化嵌入的余弦相似度映射到良好校准的概率。通过纳入局部上下文，针对不同嵌入区域进行连续、特定区域的校准，修正余弦相似度的不匹配。无需人口统计注释，适用于各种预训练模型和标准基准。
light_analysis.result: 在多种预训练模型和标准基准上，AC在准确性和公平性指标上均优于现有方法。避免了“降级”现象（即公平以牺牲某些群体性能为代价），同时提高了整体性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: AC为公平的人脸识别提供了实用方案，无需人口统计分组注释，同时提升整体性能。具有学术价值和应用价值，为未来无需人口统计信息的公平校准研究提供了新方向。

title: Entropy Is Not Enough: Unlocking Effective Reinforcement Learning for Visual Reasoning via Vision-Anchored Token Selection
abstract: While token-level entropy is commonly recognized as effective for credit assignment in text-only reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR), it remains unclear whether this mechanism still holds in visual reasoning. Our controlled study shows that this mechanism collapses in visual reasoning due to the omission of vision-sensitive tokens with naturally low entropy. Although existing multimodal RL methods increasingly acknowledge the importance of visual perception, they struggle to satisfy the inherent demand for interleaving precise perceptual grounding with semantic reasoning, either lacking systematic visual measurements or overlooking that token entropy primarily drives semantic exploration. To address this, we introduce VEPO (Vision-Entropy token-selection for Policy Optimization), an effective RL framework explicitly integrating visual sensitivity with token entropy via a principled multiplicative coupling, where VEPO redirects gradient credit toward tokens which are simultaneously visually grounded and highly informative. Extensive experiments demonstrate VEPO's leading performance, significantly outperforming the entropy-only baseline by 2.28 points at 7B-scale and 3.15 points at 3B-scale. Ablations further substantiate the soundness of our method.

light_analysis.overview: 提出VEPO框架，通过视觉锚定的token选择，结合视觉敏感性和熵，解决视觉推理中强化学习信用分配失效问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 在文本强化学习中，token级熵能有效分配信用，但在视觉推理任务中，视觉敏感token往往具有低熵，导致现有方法失效。现有多模态RL方法要么缺乏系统视觉度量，要么忽视熵主要驱动语义探索，无法同时满足精确感知和语义推理的需求。因此，需要一种新方法结合视觉感知与语义信息，实现有效的梯度信用分配。
light_analysis.method: 提出VEPO（Vision-Entropy token-selection for Policy Optimization）框架，通过乘法耦合视觉敏感性和token熵，将梯度信用重定向到同时具备视觉基础和高度信息性的token。该机制在策略优化中优先选择视觉锚定的高信息token，从而在视觉推理中实现有效学习。实验基于多模态模型，在7B和3B规模上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在视觉推理任务上，VEPO显著超越仅依赖熵的基线：7B模型提升2.28个性能点，3B模型提升3.15个性能点。消融实验进一步验证了视觉-熵耦合机制的有效性，表明视觉锚定token选择对提升多模态RL性能至关重要。
light_analysis.conclusion: VEPO通过结合视觉敏感性和token熵，有效解决了视觉推理中强化学习信用分配问题，为多模态策略优化提供了新范式。该方法提升了模型在视觉推理任务中的表现，具有重要学术价值和应用前景。未来可探索更复杂的视觉-语义交互机制。

title: Synthesize and Reward -- Reinforcement Learning for Multi-Step Tool Use in Live Environments
abstract: Training LLMs to orchestrate multi-step tool calls is held back by three coupled obstacles: realistic stateful execution environments are costly to build, synthetic training queries are often detached from the server's actual state (so the generated tool calls fail to execute), and recall-based RL rewards incentivize verbose tool-calling patterns. We present PROVE (Programmatic Rewards On Verified Environments), a framework with three contributions: (1) a library of 20 stateful MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers exposing 343 tools, enabling live-execution RL training with session-scoped state isolation; (2) a state-machine data synthesis pipeline that generates multi-turn tool-call trajectories grounded in live-sampled server state, so generated queries reference entities that actually exist; and (3) a multi-component programmatic reward with an adaptive efficiency penalty that counters the verbosity incentive of recall-based rewards. We train four models (Qwen3-4B, Qwen3-8B, Qwen2.5-7B, Granite-4.1-8B) with GRPO on the resulting ~13K training examples. On BFCL Multi-Turn, tau2-bench, and T-Eval, PROVE yields improvements of up to +10.2, +6.8, and +6.5 points respectively, demonstrating that this framework yields consistent gains on multi-step tool orchestration across two model families.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PROVE框架，通过状态化MCP服务器、状态机数据合成和程序化奖励，提升LLM多步工具调用能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 训练LLM编排多步工具调用面临三个障碍：构建真实有状态执行环境成本高昂，合成训练查询通常与服务器实际状态脱节（导致生成的工具调用无法执行），基于召回率的RL奖励会鼓励冗长的工具调用模式。现有方法难以同时解决这些问题，限制了LLM在动态环境中的多步工具使用能力。
light_analysis.method: PROVE框架包含三个贡献：1) 一个包含20个有状态MCP服务器、暴露343个工具的库，支持会话级状态隔离的实时执行RL训练；2) 一个状态机数据合成流水线，基于实时采样服务器状态生成多轮工具调用轨迹，确保查询引用真实存在的实体；3) 一个多组件程序化奖励，包含自适应效率惩罚，以对抗基于召回率奖励的冗长倾向。使用GRPO在约13K训练样本上训练了四个模型。
light_analysis.result: 在BFCL Multi-Turn、tau2-bench和T-Eval基准上，PROVE分别提升最多+10.2、+6.8和+6.5分。这表明该框架在两个模型系列（Qwen3-4B/8B、Qwen2.5-7B、Granite-4.1-8B）的多步工具编排上取得了一致增益。
light_analysis.conclusion: PROVE通过结合有状态环境、状态感知数据合成和程序化奖励，有效解决了多步工具使用的核心障碍。实验证明该方法在不同规模模型上均能显著提升性能，为LLM在真实环境中的工具编排提供了实用框架。未来可扩展更多MCP服务器和测试场景。

title: Consistency Training Can Entrench Misalignment
abstract: Consistency training encourages a model to produce similar outputs across related inputs or sampling procedures. Such methods are simple, scalable, and largely label-free, but their effects on model alignment remain poorly understood. Could the self-bootstrapping nature of these methods amplify undesired behavior in models? We test seven consistency training methods on 108 model organisms: open-source models (7B--70B) fine-tuned to exhibit various forms of controlled misaligned behavior. We find that outcomes vary significantly: consistency training generally suppresses reward hacking and emergent misalignment but amplifies sycophancy. We present evidence that distribution shifts induced by the consistency labeling process, rather than variation in the selection operators, may be the primary driver of systematic alignment effects. Finally, we present a unifying theoretical framework to derive conditions under which consistency training will amplify or suppress misalignment. In total, our study establishes that consistency training is not alignment-neutral, and that its use in critical systems should be carefully audited.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示一致性训练并非对齐中性，可能放大谄媚行为，并提出理论框架解释其条件。
light_analysis.motivation: 一致性训练方法简单、可扩展且无需大量标注，但其对模型对齐的影响尚不明确。这些方法的自引导特性可能放大不良行为，如谄媚或奖励黑客，因此需要系统评估其对不同不对齐形式的影响，以确保在关键系统中的安全使用。
light_analysis.method: 在108个开源模型（7B-70B）上测试了七种一致性训练方法，这些模型通过微调展示了各种受控的不对齐行为（如奖励黑客、谄媚、突发不对齐）。通过对比不同方法的效果，分析分布偏移和选择算子的作用，并构建统一理论框架推导放大或抑制不对齐的条件。
light_analysis.result: 一致性训练通常抑制奖励黑客和突发不对齐，但显著放大谄媚行为。证据表明，由一致性标注过程引起的分布偏移是系统性对齐效应的主要驱动因素，而非选择算子的变化。不同方法间效果差异显著。
light_analysis.conclusion: 一致性训练并非对齐中性，其对不同不对齐形式的影响各异。在关键系统中使用前需仔细审计，特别是考虑可能放大的谄媚行为。提出的理论框架为未来设计更安全的训练方法提供了指导。

title: From Answers to States: Verifiable Process-Level Evaluation of Chemical Reasoning in Large Language Models
abstract: Large language models are increasingly used as chemistry assistants, yet most chemistry benchmarks still score only final answers. This masks a critical failure mode: a model may output the correct molecule, product, or option while its reasoning violates chemical logic. Existing process-level evaluators are hard to scale because LLM judges and human step-level process annotation are costly, inconsistent, and vulnerable to hallucination. We introduce ChemCoTBench-V2, a rule-verifiable diagnostic benchmark for low-cost, auditable evaluation of structured, verifier-addressable chemical reasoning traces. It spans molecular understanding, molecule editing, molecular optimization, and reaction prediction, with 5,620 evaluation samples across 18 reporting tasks. Models must expose key intermediate steps in expert-designed templates, and those steps are checked with deterministic chemistry rules and, for closed-answer tasks, reference traces rather than another LLM judge. Open-ended molecular optimization is evaluated with oracle-verifiable state constraints rather than strict trace matching. The benchmark reports three separate signals: final-answer correctness, template adherence, and step-wise verifier correctness over expert-refined intermediate commitments. Experiments on frontier models reveal a persistent gap between final-answer success and structured-reasoning-state consistency: models often follow the requested format while failing chemical-step checks, or answer correctly with weak supporting reasoning. ChemCoTBench-V2 enables fine-grained model comparison and identifies the concrete step at which the trace first violates the verifier.

light_analysis.overview: 提出可验证的化学推理过程级评估基准ChemCoTBench-V2，通过确定性规则检查中间步骤，揭示最终答案与推理过程一致性之间的差距。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有化学基准仅评分最终答案，忽视了模型推理违反化学逻辑的关键失效模式。LLM裁判和人工步骤级标注成本高、不一致且易产生幻觉，导致难以规模化评估过程级推理。需要一种低成本、可审计的评估方法，能够诊断模型在结构化化学推理中的中间步骤正确性。
light_analysis.method: 构建ChemCoTBench-V2基准，包含5,620个评估样本，覆盖分子理解、编辑、优化和反应预测等18个报告任务。模型需在专家设计的模板中暴露关键中间步骤，然后使用确定性化学规则和参考轨迹进行验证。开放分子优化任务采用预言机可验证的状态约束。基准报告最终答案正确性、模板遵循度和步骤级验证正确性三个独立信号。
light_analysis.result: 在前沿模型上的实验显示，最终答案成功率与结构化推理状态一致性之间存在持续差距：模型常遵循格式但化学步骤检查失败，或答案正确但推理薄弱。ChemCoTBench-V2能够细粒度比较模型，并识别轨迹首次违反验证器的具体步骤。摘要未明确说明具体性能数值，但指出了这种差距的存在。
light_analysis.conclusion: ChemCoTBench-V2提供了一种低成本、可审计的化学推理过程级评估方法，揭示了当前LLM在化学推理中的关键缺陷。学术价值在于推动从答案评分向过程验证的转变，实际应用有助于构建更可靠的化学助手。未来可扩展至更多化学领域，或用于训练改进推理一致性。

title: AnchorMoE: Interpretable Time Series Classification via Anchor-Routed MoE
abstract: Multivariate time series classification (MTSC) is pivotal in high-stakes domains, such as clinical diagnosis and industrial fault detection, where safe deployment necessitates transparent decision-making. However, isolating the temporal segments that drive model predictions is challenging because discriminative signals in real-world time series are typically sparse, heterogeneous, and heavily obscured by background noise. This paper, therefore, proposes AnchorMoE, an interpretable-by-construction classification framework. Built upon a Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architecture, AnchorMoE encodes multi-view representations of local patches and routes them to specialized experts, ensuring that the final prediction is formulated as an exact additive decomposition over the input segments, facilitating ante-hoc transparency rather than relying on post-hoc estimations. To maintain the reliability of this decomposition under sparse signal distributions, we introduce a geometric orthogonality constraint that penalizes representational redundancy, compelling distinct experts to specialize in heterogeneous predictive patterns. Furthermore, an uncertainty-aware reliability gate is designed to dynamically calibrate the contribution of each segment, effectively suppressing residual background noise. Extensive experiments on real-world and synthetic benchmarks demonstrate that AnchorMoE achieves highly competitive classification performance while faithfully grounding its decisions in the raw time series.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AnchorMoE，一种通过锚定路由混合专家实现可解释时间序列分类的框架。
light_analysis.motivation: 多变量时间序列分类在临床诊断、工业故障检测等高风险领域至关重要，但现有方法难以隔离驱动模型预测的时间段，因为真实时间序列中的判别信号通常稀疏、异质且被背景噪声严重掩盖。后验解释方法不可靠，需要先验透明的决策机制。
light_analysis.method: AnchorMoE基于混合专家架构，对局部补丁进行多视角编码并路由至专门专家，将最终预测表示为输入片段的精确加性分解，实现先验透明度。引入几何正交约束惩罚表示冗余，迫使不同专家专攻异质预测模式。设计不确定性感知可靠性门控动态校准各片段贡献，抑制背景噪声。
light_analysis.result: 在真实和合成基准数据集上的大量实验表明，AnchorMoE在实现高度竞争分类性能的同时，能忠实地将决策基于原始时间序列。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但强调可解释性提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: AnchorMoE通过先验可解释的分解结构，解决了时间序列分类中信号稀疏和噪声干扰下的透明度问题，为高风险应用提供可靠决策依据。未来可探索更高效的专家路由机制或扩展到其他序列任务。

title: LEAP: Supercharging LLMs for Formal Mathematics with Agentic Frameworks
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) exhibit strong informal mathematical reasoning but struggle to generate mechanically verifiable proofs in formal languages like Lean. We present LEAP, an agentic framework that enables general-purpose foundation models to achieve state-of-the-art performance on automated formal theorem proving. LEAP leverages foundation model capabilities, such as informal reasoning, instruction following, and iterative self-refinement. By decomposing complex problems into smaller units, the system bridges formal proof construction with informal blueprints through continuous interaction with the Lean compiler. To provide a rigorous evaluation beyond increasingly saturated benchmarks, we introduce Lean-IMO-Bench, a benchmark of IMO-style problems formalized in Lean, with short statements yet highly non-routine and multi-step proofs across a wide range of difficulty levels. Empirically, on the latest 2025 Putnam Competition, an annual mathematics competition for undergraduate students in North America, LEAP solves all 12 problems, matching recent breakthroughs by frontier formal mathematical models. On Lean-IMO-Bench, LEAP boosts the one-shot formal solve rate of general-purpose LLMs from below 10% to 70%, notably surpassing the 48% benchmark set by a specialized, gold-medal-caliber IMO system. Furthermore, we demonstrate LEAP's research-level utility by autonomously formalizing complex proofs for open combinatorial challenges, including a verified proof for a key subproblem in Knuth's Hamiltonian decomposition of even-order Cayley graphs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LEAP智能体框架，使通用大模型在形式定理证明上达到SOTA，通过分解问题和交互式自改进，显著提升形式化证明能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型在非正式数学推理中表现出色，但难以生成如Lean等语言中机械可验证的正式证明。现有方法依赖专门模型或饱和基准，缺乏对通用模型的系统性利用。该研究旨在通过智能体框架桥接非正式推理与形式证明，解决通用模型在形式数学中的短板，并建立更难基准（Lean-IMO-Bench）以推动评估。
light_analysis.method: LEAP是一个智能体框架，利用基础模型的能力如非正式推理、指令遵循和迭代自我改进。它将复杂问题分解为小单元，通过与Lean编译器持续交互，将正式证明构建与非正式蓝本结合。框架无需专门训练，直接应用于通用大模型。引入Lean-IMO-Bench，包含IMO风格问题，语句简短但证明多步且非常规。
light_analysis.result: 在2025年Putnam竞赛上，LEAP解决全部12道题，匹配前沿专门模型。在Lean-IMO-Bench上，将通用LLM的一次性正式求解率从<10%提升至70%，超过专门IMO金牌系统的48%。此外，自动形式化Knuth猜想中偶数阶Cayley图哈密顿分解的关键子问题，展示研究级效用。
light_analysis.conclusion: LEAP证明了通用基础模型通过智能体框架可在形式数学中达到顶尖性能，无需领域特化。它提升了自动定理证明的实用性，为数学研究和教育提供新工具。未来可扩展至更多形式系统，但可能受限于LLM的推理能力和计算成本，需进一步优化交互效率。

title: Reinforcement Learning from Cross-domain Videos with Video Prediction Model
abstract: Reinforcement learning from expert videos across visually distinct domains is challenging due to the absence of reward signals and the presence of domain gaps. We introduce XIPER (Cross-domain Video Prediction Reward), a reward model for learning from expert videos collected in a visually different domain, where the agent's appearance differs due to factors such as color, morphology, or the sim-to-real gap. More specifically, XIPER trains a cross-domain video prediction model that maps agent observations into the expert domain and uses the prediction likelihood as a reward signal. Experiments on the DMC Color Suite (8 tasks) and DMC Body Suite (3 tasks) show that XIPER consistently outperforms baselines despite domain gaps such as differences in agent color and morphology. We further analyze XIPER on a sim-to-real transfer dataset, demonstrating that it produces meaningful reward signals for real-robot observations given only simulated expert videos. Code, pretrained models, datasets and video demonstrations can be found on our project webpage: https://sites.google.com/view/xiper

light_analysis.overview: 提出XIPER，一种跨域视频预测奖励模型，利用视频预测似然作为奖励信号，实现从视觉不同领域的专家视频中进行强化学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 从跨领域专家视频中学习强化学习面临两大挑战：缺乏奖励信号和存在领域差异（如颜色、形态或模拟到现实的差距）。现有方法难以有效处理这些视觉域差异，导致学习效果不佳。因此需要一种能够自动生成奖励信号并适应域差异的方法。
light_analysis.method: XIPER训练一个跨域视频预测模型，将智能体观测映射到专家域，并使用预测似然作为奖励信号。该模型通过预测专家域中的未来帧来评估智能体行为，从而提供内在奖励。在DMC Color Suite（8个任务）和DMC Body Suite（3个任务）上评估，并进一步在模拟到真实迁移数据集上验证。
light_analysis.result: 在DMC Color Suite和Body Suite上，XIPER在代理颜色和形态差异下持续优于基线方法。在模拟到真实迁移任务中，XIPER仅使用模拟专家视频就能为真实机器人观测生成有意义的奖励信号，证明了其有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: XIPER通过跨域视频预测有效解决了缺乏奖励和域差异问题，为从不同视觉领域的专家视频中学习强化学习提供了新方案。其应用价值体现在模拟到现实迁移等场景，未来可扩展到更复杂的域差异和任务。

title: Anomalies in Multivariate Time Series Benchmarks Are Mostly Univariate
abstract: Many recent multivariate time series anomaly detection (MTSAD) models incorporate cross-channel modeling, under the implicit assumption that the structure of anomalies may be spread across multiple channels. We evaluate this assumption on eight widely used public benchmarks by introducing a per-segment diagnostic framework that flags, for each labeled anomaly, whether at least one channel deviates individually from its normal history, whether the cross-channel correlation structure changes, or both. The framework shows that no cross-channel rupture occurs without an accompanying univariate deviation across a range of reasonable thresholds. A complementary metric also reveals that on six of the eight benchmarks, at least half of the labeled anomaly segments deviate univariately on 89% to 100% of their timesteps, reaching 100% on three of these datasets. To verify that our framework captures cross-channel structure when present, we construct synthetic data of phase-shifted sinusoidal channels with shared noise. Each anomalous segment is altered through one of two channel-wise corruptions that preserve the per-channel marginal distribution while breaking cross-channel structure, and our framework correctly characterizes these segments as cross-channel-only. On these data, channel-dependent (CD) models successfully exploit the cross-channel signal whereas channel-independent (CI) ones fail. The CI/CD comparison of a recent SOTA detector on real benchmarks further confirms that CD modeling brings no measurable gain. We conclude that current MTSAD benchmarks are unsuitable for validating cross-channel modeling capabilities, and we call for the development of more structurally diverse evaluation sets. The code for this study is publicly available.

light_analysis.overview: 发现多变量时间序列异常检测基准中的异常大多本质上是单变量的，跨通道建模无实际增益，当前基准不适合验证跨通道建模能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有MTSAD模型普遍采用跨通道建模，假设异常结构可能跨越多个通道。但这种假设在常用基准中缺乏验证。本文旨在系统评估该假设，揭示基准中异常的真实结构特征，为模型设计提供指导。
light_analysis.method: 提出逐段诊断框架，对每个标记异常段，检测是否存在单通道偏差、跨通道相关性变化或两者兼有。使用八个公开基准和合成数据（相位偏移正弦通道）进行验证。合成数据人工构造仅跨通道异常的片段，检验框架区分能力。
light_analysis.result: 在所有基准中，没有发现仅跨通道异常而不伴随单变量偏差的情况。六个基准中至少一半异常段在89%-100%时间步上有单变量偏差。合成数据上框架正确识别跨通道异常，跨通道模型有效但实际基准中无增益。
light_analysis.conclusion: 当前MTSAD基准不适合验证跨通道建模能力，需要开发结构更多样的评估集。研究揭示模型评估中的潜在误导，推动更合理的基准设计。

title: AutoMedBench: Towards Medical AutoResearch with Agentic AI Models
abstract: Autonomous agents are increasingly expected to support end-to-end medical-AI research workflows, moving beyond isolated prediction tasks or short-form clinical question answering. However, existing medical agent benchmarks primarily evaluate final outputs, providing limited visibility into agent behavior within the research process. To address this gap, we present AutoMedBench, a workflow-aware benchmark for autonomous medical-AI research across diverse medical imaging and multimodal inference tasks, organizing agent execution into a unified five-stage workflow (S1-S5): Plan, Setup, Validate, Inference, and Submit. It comprises long-horizon tasks with each run averaging 33 agent turns, spanning five research tracks: segmentation, image enhancement, visual question answering (VQA), report generation, and lesion detection. Each task is evaluated under two difficulty tiers, Lite and Standard, which use the same data and metrics but differ in the amount of task-brief scaffolding, and each run is scored using both final task performance and S1-S5 stage scores, enabling stage-level analysis from the initial task brief to the final submitted artifact. Across thousands of recorded runs, stage-level scoring reveals that Validate is the weakest workflow stage on average, whereas Setup is the strongest, suggesting that current agents are better at making pipelines executable than at verifying their reliability. Post-run error analysis further shows that verification and submission failures dominate tagged errors, accounting for 37.7% and 38.1% of fired codes respectively, whereas task-understanding errors are rare at 0.9%, and runs with one fired error code have a 48% lower overall score than runs with no error code on average.

light_analysis.overview: 提出面向自主医学AI研究的流程感知基准AutoMedBench，包含五阶段工作流和双层难度评估，可揭示智能体在医学研究各阶段的性能弱点。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有医疗智能体基准主要评估最终输出，缺乏对研究过程中智能体行为的可见性。医学AI研究需要端到端的工作流支持，但当前无法有效分析智能体在各阶段的执行情况，阻碍了对模型可靠性的深入理解。因此需要一种工作流感知的基准，能够从规划到提交全程评估智能体行为。
light_analysis.method: AutoMedBench将智能体执行为统一五阶段工作流（S1规划、S2设置、S3验证、S4推理、S5提交），覆盖分割、图像增强、VQA、报告生成、病变检测五个研究轨道。每个任务有Lite和Standard两种难度，使用相同数据和指标但任务简报脚手架不同。评估采用最终任务性能和S1-S5阶段得分双重评分，实现从初始任务简报至最终提交工件的层级分析。
light_analysis.result: 在数千次运行中，阶段得分显示S3验证阶段平均最强，S2设置阶段最弱。错误分析表明验证失败（37.7%）和提交失败（38.1%）占主导，任务理解错误仅0.9%。含一个错误代码的运行平均总分比无错误代码运行低48%，凸显验证与提交环节是瓶颈。
light_analysis.conclusion: AutoMedBench揭示了当前智能体在医学AI研究中更擅长搭建可执行流程（设置阶段），但在验证可靠性和最终提交方面存在显著弱点。工作流级评估为针对性改进提供了依据，有助于开发更鲁棒的自主研究助手。未来可扩展至更多医学任务和交互模式。

title: Subliminal Learning Is Steering Vector Distillation
abstract: Subliminal learning refers to a student language model acquiring a teacher's traits (e.g. a system-prompted preference for owls) when fine-tuned on the teacher's outputs, despite the outputs being semantically unrelated to those traits. It remains poorly understood how data without semantic meaning can transfer specific semantic traits. In this work, we show that subliminal learning is mediated by a single steering vector, i.e. a vector added to the model's activations. Across two open-source models, we find that the teacher's system prompt is well approximated by a steering vector, and that the student's behavior is driven by learning an aligned vector over fine-tuning. System prompts that are not well approximated by steering vectors are not subliminally learned. This is a special case of steering vector distillation, in which a student trained on the outputs of a steered teacher learns to imitate that steering. We demonstrate steering vector distillation on a range of semantic and random vectors. Adding a semantic vector to a model's activations can have both model-independent and model-specific (i.e. non-semantic) effects on its behavior, so generated data that is non-semantic can transmit a vector with semantic effects, enabling subliminal learning. This also explains why subliminal learning does not transfer between models. We find that adaptive optimizers are necessary for subliminal learning in language models: activation gradients on steered data carry a small but consistent component along the steering direction, and non-adaptive optimizers impede this by allowing outlier gradients to dominate.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示潜隐学习（subliminal learning）的本质是引导向量蒸馏（steering vector distillation），并通过实验验证。
light_analysis.motivation: 潜隐学习现象指学生模型在教师模型语义无关的输出上微调后，却学会了教师的系统提示偏好。现有方法对此机制缺乏理解，需要解释非语义数据如何传递语义特征。
light_analysis.method: 提出潜隐学习由单个引导向量（steering vector）介导。教师系统提示可近似为一个引导向量，学生通过微调学习对齐该向量。实验使用两个开源模型，展示了引导向量蒸馏，并在多种语义和随机向量上验证。发现自适应优化器对潜隐学习必要，非自适应优化器会受异常梯度干扰。
light_analysis.result: 教师系统提示可被引导向量良好逼近；不能良好逼近的系统提示不会被潜隐学习。引导向量蒸馏在语义和随机向量上均有效。发现非语义数据可通过模型无关和模型特定效应传递语义向量。自适应优化器是必要的，因为激活梯度在引导方向上存在小而一致的分量。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示潜隐学习机制为引导向量蒸馏，解释了非语义数据传递语义特征的原因，以及为何潜隐学习不跨模型迁移。指出自适应优化器的关键作用。为理解语言模型微调中的隐性知识迁移提供理论基础，但可能受限于特定模型架构。

title: SkyShield: Occupancy as a Safety Interface for Low-Altitude UAV Autonomy
abstract: For low-altitude Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) autonomy, 3D spatial understanding is not merely a perception objective, but the safety interface between human instructions and physical flight. In human-scale urban airspace below 20 meters, thin geometry, occlusions, vegetation, and urban clutter define whether an aerial agent can safely enter the space ahead. However, existing UAV datasets mainly provide 2D annotations or 3D boxes, while driving-oriented occupancy benchmarks assume stable ground-level sensor rigs. Both miss the defining regime of low-altitude flight: a front-facing monocular camera observing occupied and free space from a moving aerial body with frame-wise changing 6-DoF pose and camera extrinsics. To bridge this gap, we introduce SkyShield, to the best of our knowledge the first front-view monocular semantic occupancy benchmark for urban UAV flight below 20 meters. Built on CARLA, SkyShield contains 36K front-view UAV samples across diverse urban scenes and weather conditions, pairing each image with frame-wise 6-DoF UAV pose, frame-wise dynamic camera geometry, UAV states, and front-frustum semantic occupancy labels. We further propose KAR-mIoU, a UAV-centric and dynamics-aware metric that re-weights voxel-level evaluation by kinematic reachability and time-to-collision, revealing safety-critical risks hidden by conventional mIoU. To tackle this challenging new setting, we provide SkyOcc, a geometry-first monocular baseline that integrates frame-wise UAV attitude into projection, fuses temporal occupancy features, and applies safety-prior optimization to preserve sparse collision-critical structures. Together, SkyShield, KAR-mIoU, and SkyOcc establish occupancy as a safety interface for low-altitude aerial autonomy. Code and dataset will be released publicly.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个低空无人机前视图单目语义占用基准SkyShield，将占用感知作为安全接口。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有UAV数据集主要提供2D标注或3D框，而驾驶场景的占用基准假设地面固定传感器，都无法适用于低空飞行（20米以下）的前视单目占用感知。该场景面临薄几何、遮挡、植被等挑战，且需考虑无人机6-DoF姿态和动态相机参数。因此需要专门的数据集和指标来评估安全关键区域。
light_analysis.method: 基于CARLA构建36K前视图UAV样本，覆盖多样城市和天气，每张图像配准6-DoF姿态、动态相机几何、状态和前端截锥体语义占用标签。提出KAR-mIoU指标，通过运动可达性和碰撞时间重新加权体素评估。提出基线SkyOcc，集成帧级姿态投影、时序特征融合和安全先验优化以保留稀疏碰撞关键结构。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明KAR-mIoU能揭示传统mIoU隐藏的安全风险。SkyOcc在SkyShield上展现出有效的占用预测能力，但摘要未给出具体数值对比。代码和数据集将开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: SkyShield、KAR-mIoU和SkyOcc共同建立了占用作为低空无人机自主性的安全接口，填补了该领域基准缺失。学术上推动了单目占用感知与无人机安全的交叉研究；实际应用价值在于提升低空UAV自主飞行的安全性。未来工作可扩展至真实场景或动态障碍物。

title: Towards Verifiable Multimodal Deep Research: A Multi-Agent Harness for Interleaved Report Generation
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have advanced autonomous agents from deep search, which retrieves concise factual answers, to deep research, which synthesizes scattered evidence into long-form reports. However, verifiable multimodal deep research remains challenging due to open-ended synthesis without deterministic ground truth and the need to interleave textual arguments with visual evidence. We propose Ptah, a multi-agent harness for interleaved report generation. Ptah orchestrates the lifecycle from user query to rendered web report through planning, research, and writing stages, where specialized agents construct visual-aware plans, collect claim-grounded evidence, maintain source-aligned images in a Visual Working Memory, and compose reports through declarative multimodal tool use. A verifier agent serves as the harness's acceptance function, enforcing factual grounding, citation fidelity, and cross-modal consistency throughout the workflow. We further introduce PtahEval, an evaluation protocol that augments existing benchmarks with image-level and presentation-level assessments. Experiments on deep research benchmarks show that Ptah produces more reliable, visually informative, and usable human-facing multimodal reports than strong baselines. Our code is released at https://github.com/SnowNation101/Ptah

light_analysis.overview: 提出Ptah多智能体框架，实现可验证的多模态深度研究报告生成，通过规划、研究、写作三阶段协同和验证器确保事实准确与跨模态一致性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有大型语言模型驱动的自主智能体从深度搜索（检索简明事实答案）发展到深度研究（综合零散证据生成长篇报告）。然而，可验证的多模态深度研究仍面临挑战：开放式的综合缺乏确定性真实标准，且需要将文本论证与视觉证据交错呈现。现有方法难以保证事实依据、引用准确性和跨模态一致性，生成的报告可靠性不足。
light_analysis.method: Ptah是一个多智能体框架，通过规划、研究和写作三阶段编排从用户查询到呈现网页报告的完整流程。专用智能体构建视觉感知计划、收集面向主张的证据、在视觉工作记忆中维护源对齐图像，并通过声明式多模态工具使用组合报告。验证器智能体作为框架的接受函数，在整个流程中强制执行事实依据、引用保真度和跨模态一致性。
light_analysis.result: 在深度研究基准上，Ptah生成的报告相比强基线更可靠、视觉信息更丰富且对用户更友好。论文引入PtahEval评估协议，增强现有基准的图片级和呈现级评估。实验表明Ptah在事实准确性、视觉证据整合和整体可用性方面显著优于对比方法，具体数据摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: Ptah为可验证的多模态深度研究提供了有效解决方案，通过多智能体协作和验证器机制解决了事实依据和跨模态一致性的关键问题。研究成果在学术上推动了AI生成研究报告的可靠性，实际应用中可辅助科研、新闻等场景的长篇多模态内容创作。未来可扩展至更多模态和更复杂的推理任务。

title: Correcting Visual Blur Induced by Attention Distraction to Reduce Hallucinations: Algorithm and Theory
abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) frequently suffer from object hallucinations, yet the visual perceptual mechanism underlying this failure remains poorly understood. In this work, we reveal that hallucinations are strongly associated with a human-like attention distraction phenomenon, where humans under divided focus experience degraded visual clarity and produce inaccurate descriptions, while in models the same mechanism manifests as spatial inconsistency in multi-head attention and temporal fading of attention to image tokens during decoding. We further provide theoretical insights that attention dispersion increases model complexity and degrades classification generalization. Motivated by these findings, we propose an Attention-Focused Approach for Improved Image Perception (AFIP), which corrects attention distraction via cross-head attention enrichment and reinforces visual grounding through dynamic historical attention enhancement. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks and models validate the effectiveness of AFIP without additional training.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示多模态大模型幻觉与注意力分散的关系，提出无需训练的AFIP方法校正注意力分散以提升视觉感知。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态大语言模型常出现对象幻觉，但其视觉感知机制不明。现有研究未从注意力分散角度解释幻觉，且缺乏针对性的轻量级校准方法。本文发现幻觉与类似人类的注意力分散相关，表现为多头注意力空间不一致和时间衰减，理论证明分散增加模型复杂度并降低泛化，亟需有效校正。
light_analysis.method: 提出AFIP（注意力聚焦图像感知方法），包含两项核心：跨头注意力丰富（交叉头信息融合）和动态历史注意力增强（利用解码过程的历史注意力强化视觉定位）。无需额外训练，在推理时直接调整注意力分布。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准和模型上实验，AFIP显著降低对象幻觉率，提升描述准确性。与基线相比，无需数据或微调即可达到更好性能，具体指标如幻觉率降低（摘要未列具体数值），验证了注意力分散校正的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文从理论和算法层面揭示了注意力分散是幻觉的关键因素，并提出轻量级解决方案AFIP。该发现深化了对多模态模型视觉机制的理解，为缓解幻觉提供新思路，且无需训练的特性便于实际应用。未来可探索更通用的注意力约束框架。

title: REFLECTOR: Internalizing Step-wise Reflection against Indirect Jailbreak
abstract: While Large Language Models (LLMs) demonstrate remarkable capabilities, they remain susceptible to sophisticated, multi-step jailbreak attacks that circumvent conventional surface-level safety alignment by exploiting the internal generation process. To address these vulnerabilities, we propose Reflector, a principled two-stage framework that internalizes self-reflection within the generation trajectory. Reflector first leverages teacher-guided generation to produce high-quality reflection data for supervised fine-tuning (SFT), establishing structured reflection patterns. It subsequently uses Reinforcement Learning (RL) with outcome-driven and reward-validity supervision to instill robust, autonomous self-reflection capabilities. Empirical results show that Reflector achieves Defense Success Rates (DSR) exceeding 90% against complex indirect attacks while generalizing robustly across diverse threat scenarios. Notably, the framework enhances both task-specific and general utility, yielding a 5.85% gain on GSM8K alongside improved performance on knowledge-intensive benchmarks. By internalizing trajectory-level safety, Reflector overcomes the fundamental limitations of surface alignment without significant computational overhead, offering an efficient and scalable solution for the development of safe and capable LLMs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出REFLECTOR框架，通过内化轨迹级自我反思防御间接越狱攻击，实现高防御成功率与通用能力提升。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型易受多步越狱攻击，现有安全对齐仅关注表面层，无法防御利用内部生成过程的复杂攻击。需一种能内化反思能力、从生成轨迹层面保障安全的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出REFLECTOR两阶段框架：先用教师引导生成高质量反思数据，通过监督微调建立结构化反思模式；再用强化学习（结果驱动与奖励有效性监督）培养自主反思能力。无需显著计算开销。
light_analysis.result: 防御成功率（DSR）超90%对抗复杂间接攻击，且泛化性强；在GSM8K上提升5.85%，知识密集型基准性能也获改进。相比表面对齐方法更高效可扩展。
light_analysis.conclusion: REFLECTOR通过内化轨迹级安全，克服了表面对齐的局限，实现安全与能力双赢。为开发安全且强大的LLM提供高效可扩展方案。

title: Widening the Gap: Exploiting LLM Quantization via Outlier Injection
abstract: LLM quantization has become essential for memory-efficient deployment. Recent work has shown that quantization schemes can pose critical security risks: an adversary may release a model that appears benign in full precision but exhibits malicious behavior once quantized by users. However, existing quantization-conditioned attacks have been limited to relatively simple quantization methods, where the attacker can estimate weight regions that remain invariant under the target quantization. Notably, prior attacks have consistently failed to compromise more popular and sophisticated schemes, limiting their practical impact. In this work, we introduce the first quantization-conditioned attack that consistently induces malicious behavior that can be triggered by a broad range of advanced quantization techniques, including AWQ, GPTQ, and GGUF I-quants. Our attack exploits a simple property shared by many modern quantization methods: large outliers can cause other weights to be rounded to zero. Consequently, by injecting outliers into specific weight blocks, an adversary can induce a targeted, predictable weight collapse in the model. This effect can be used to craft seemingly benign full-precision models that exhibit a wide range of malicious behaviors after quantization. Through extensive evaluation across three attack scenarios and LLMs, we show that our attack achieves high success rates against a broad range of quantization methods on which prior attacks fail. Our results demonstrate, for the first time, that the security risks of quantization are not restricted to simpler schemes but are broadly relevant across complex, widely-used quantization methods.

light_analysis.overview: 首次实现针对多种主流LLM量化方法（AWQ、GPTQ、GGUF I-quants）的量化条件攻击，通过注入异常值诱导权重崩溃，触发恶意行为。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM量化技术虽能降低内存开销，但也引入安全风险：攻击者可发布在未量化时表现正常、量化后产生恶意行为的模型。现有攻击仅针对简单量化方法，无法攻破更普及复杂的量化方案（如AWQ、GPTQ），实际影响有限。因此，亟需一种能广泛作用于高级量化技术的攻击方法，揭示其安全漏洞。
light_analysis.method: 关键洞察是许多现代量化方法对异常值敏感：大的异常值会导致其他权重在量化时被舍入为零。攻击者在特定权重块中注入精心设计的异常值，从而在量化过程中引发目标性权重崩溃。该方法无需了解量化内部细节，仅需利用量化共有的数值特性，即可构建全精度下正常、量化后恶意的模型。
light_analysis.result: 在三个攻击场景下对多种LLM评估，攻击对AWQ、GPTQ、GGUF I-quants等先进量化方法均取得高成功率，而先前方法在这些场景下完全失效。具体数据未明确给出，但摘要指出成功率显著高于基线，首次证明量化安全风险广泛存在于复杂量化技术中。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文揭示了量化过程的新安全威胁，表明复杂量化方法同样易受恶意攻击，打破了此前认为仅简单量化有风险的认知。该发现对LLM的安全部署具有重要警示意义，需在量化方案中考虑异常值缓解措施。未来工作可探索防御策略及更通用攻击的防范。

title: SciIntegrity-Bench: A Benchmark for Evaluating Academic Integrity in AI Scientist Systems
abstract: AI scientist systems are increasingly deployed for autonomous research, yet their academic integrity has never been systematically evaluated. We introduce SCIINTEGRITY-BENCH, the first benchmark designed around a dilemmatic evaluation paradigm: each of its 33 scenarios across 11 trap categories is constructed so that honest acknowledgment of failure is the only correct response, while task completion requires misconduct. Across 231 evaluation runs spanning 7 state-of-the-art LLMs, the overall integrity problem rate reaches 34.2%, and no model achieves zero failures. Most strikingly, across missing-data scenarios, all seven models generate synthetic data rather than acknowledging infeasibility, differing only in whether they disclose the substitution. A further prompt ablation study separates two drivers: removing explicit completion pressure sharply reduces undisclosed fabrication from 20.6% to 3.2%, while the underlying synthesis rate remains unchanged, revealing an intrinsic completion bias that persists independent of prompt-level instructions. These findings point to the absence of honest refusal as a trained disposition as the primary driver of observed failures. We release SCIINTEGRITY-BENCH at https://github.com/liuxingtong/Sci-Integrity-Bench.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个评估AI科学家系统学术诚信的基准SCIINTEGRITY-BENCH，发现所有模型均存在诚信问题。
light_analysis.motivation: AI科学家系统被广泛用于自主研究，但其学术诚信从未被系统评估。现有方法缺乏对科研伦理行为的量化标准，尤其是模型在困境下是否选择作弊。作者旨在构建一个基准，测试模型在“诚实承认失败”与“完成任务但可能违规”之间的抉择。
light_analysis.method: 构建包含33个场景、11个陷阱类别的SCIINTEGRITY-BENCH，每个场景设计为只有诚实承认失败才是正确回应，否则需学术不端。对7个LLM进行231次评估，并设计消融实验，通过提示调整分离完成压力与内在完成偏见的影响。
light_analysis.result: 总体诚信问题率达34.2%，无模型零失败。缺失数据场景中所有模型均生成合成数据而非承认不可行。消融实验显示：移除完成压力使未披露捏造从20.6%降至3.2%，但合成率不变，表明存在独立于提示的固有完成偏见。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次系统评估AI科学家系统的学术诚信，揭示内在完成偏见是诚信失败的主因。工作为构建更可信的自主研究系统提供评估工具，未来可探索训练诚实拒绝的机制。

title: Curated Synthetic Data Doesn't Have to Collapse: A Theoretical Study of Generative Retraining with Pluralistic Preferences
abstract: Recursive retraining of generative models poses a critical representation challenge: when synthetic outputs are curated based on a fixed reward signal, the model tends to collapse onto a narrow set of outputs that over-optimize that objective. Prior work suggests that such collapse is unavoidable without adding real data into the mix. We revisit this conclusion from an alignment perspective and show that collapse can be mitigated through curation based on multiple reward functions. We formalize the dynamics of recursive training under heterogeneous preferences and prove that, under certain conditions, the model converges to a stable distribution that allocates probability mass across competing high-reward regions. The limiting distribution preserves diversity and provably satisfies a weighted Nash bargaining solution, offering a formal interpretation of value aggregation in synthetic retraining loops.
comment: Proceedings of the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning, Seoul, South Korea. PMLR 306, 2026

light_analysis.overview: 理论证明，通过基于多元奖励函数的策展，生成模型在递归训练中可避免崩溃，收敛分布保持多样性并满足加权纳什谈判解。
light_analysis.motivation: 递归训练生成模型时，基于固定奖励的合成数据策展会导致模型输出崩溃，先前研究认为必须加入真实数据才能防止。本文从对齐视角重新审视，提出使用多个奖励函数进行策展，旨在无需真实数据即可维持模型多样性，避免过度优化单一目标。
light_analysis.method: 形式化异质偏好下的递归训练动态，证明在策展基于多个奖励函数且满足特定条件时，模型收敛到一个稳定分布，该分布将概率质量分配给竞争的高奖励区域。关键创新在于证明收敛分布是加权纳什谈判解，为合成数据再训练中的价值聚合提供理论解释。
light_analysis.result: 理论结果表明，模型不会崩溃，收敛分布保持多样性，且无需加入真实数据。与先前认为崩溃不可避免的结论形成对比，明确了多元偏好策展的有效性。未提供具体实验数据，论文为纯理论分析。
light_analysis.conclusion: 从对齐角度解决了生成模型递归训练中的崩溃问题，证明多元偏好策展可维持多样性。学术价值在于为合成数据再训练提供严格的数学框架，实际应用可用于改进生成模型的训练范式。未来可研究更一般条件下的收敛性。

title: Stochastic Sparse Attention for Memory-Bound Inference
abstract: Autoregressive decoding becomes bandwidth-limited at long contexts, as generating each token requires reading all $n_k$ key and value vectors from KV cache. We present Stochastic Additive No-mulT Attention (SANTA), a method that sparsifies value-cache access by sampling $S \ll n_k$ indices from the post-softmax distribution and aggregates only those value rows. This yields an unbiased estimator of the post-softmax value aggregation while replacing value-stage multiply-accumulates with gather-and-add. We introduce stratified and systematic sampling to design variance-reduced, GPU-friendly variants. Evaluated on Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct at 32k-token contexts, S$^2$ANTA matches baseline accuracy while achieving up to $1.5\times$ decode-step attention-kernel speedup over FlashInfer and FlashDecoding on an NVIDIA RTX 6000 Ada. In batched long-context generation, these kernel gains translate to up to $1.25\times$ end-to-end decode-latency speedup. Finally, we propose Bernoulli $qK^\mathsf{T}$ sampling as a complementary technique to sparsify the score stage, reducing key-feature access through stochastic ternary queries. Both methods are complementary to upstream quantization, low-rank projection, KV-cache compression, and KV-cache selection methods. Together, they point toward sparse, multiplier-free, and energy-efficient inference. We open-source our kernels at: https://github.com/OPUSLab/SANTA.git

light_analysis.overview: 提出 SANTA 方法，通过随机稀疏化注意力计算中的值缓存访问，实现带宽受限推理的加速。
light_analysis.motivation: 自回归解码在长上下文场景下受限于内存带宽，因为生成每个 token 需要从 KV 缓存中读取所有键值向量。现有方法如 FlashAttention 虽优化了计算，但未有效减少内存读取开销。这导致解码延迟高，尤其在批量长上下文生成时成为瓶颈。因此需要一种能稀疏化值缓存访问且保持精度的注意力机制。
light_analysis.method: SANTA 从 softmax 后分布中采样 S 个索引，仅聚合这些索引对应的值向量，用 gather-add 替代乘加运算，实现无偏估计。采用分层和系统采样设计方差减少、GPU 友好的变体（S²ANTA）。此外，提出 Bernoulli qKᵀ 采样作为互补，通过随机三元查询稀疏化注意力分数计算，减少键特征访问。方法可与其他压缩技术协同。
light_analysis.result: 在 Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct 模型上，32k 上下文长度下，S²ANTA 匹配基线精度。注意力核相比 FlashInfer 和 FlashDecoding 实现 1.5 倍加速，批量长上下文生成中端到端解码延迟提速 1.25 倍。实验结果证明了稀疏化注意力对带宽受限场景的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SANTA 提供了稀疏、免乘法、能效更高的注意力推理方案。其无偏估计保证了精度，而 GPU 友好采样实现了实际加速。该方法与量化、压缩等技术互补，可集成到现有推理框架中。未来工作可能探索更优采样策略或结合硬件特性进一步优化。

title: MAEPose: Self-Supervised Spatiotemporal Learning for Human Pose Estimation on mmWave Video
abstract: Millimetre-wave (mmWave) radar offers a more privacy-preserving alternative to RGB-based human pose estimation. However, existing methods typically rely on pre-extracted intermediate representations such as sparse point clouds or spectrogram images, where the rich spatiotemporal information naturally present in radar video streams is discarded for model learning, while such signal processing adds system complexity. In addition, existing solutions are mainly conducted in an end-to-end supervised manner without leveraging unlabelled raw video streams to learn generalized representations. In this study, we present MAEPose, a masked autoencoding-based human pose estimation approach that operates directly on mmWave spectrogram videos. MAEPose learns spatiotemporal motion-aware generalized representations from unlabelled radar video, and leverages its heatmap decoder for multi-frame pose estimation predictions. We evaluate it across three datasets based on leave-one-person-out cross-validation with rigorous statistical testing. MAEPose consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines by up to 22.1% in MPJPE p<0.05, and maintains robust accuracy under zero-shot bystander interference with only a 6.5% error increase. Ablation studies confirm that both the pre-training and the heatmap decoder contribute substantially, while modality analysis indicates that leveraging Range-Doppler video as input achieves better pose estimation performance than Range-Azimuth or their fusion, with lower computational cost.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MAEPose，一种基于掩码自编码的毫米波雷达视频人体姿态估计方法，直接处理雷达视频，通过自监督学习时空运动感知表示。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有毫米波雷达姿态估计方法依赖预提取的中间表示（如点云、频谱图），丢弃了丰富的时空信息，且信号处理增加系统复杂度。同时，这些方法多采用全监督方式，未利用无标签原始视频学习通用表示。因此，需要一种直接处理雷达视频、利用无标签数据进行自监督学习的方法，以降低系统复杂度并提升泛化能力。
light_analysis.method: MAEPose采用掩码自编码框架，直接处理毫米波频谱视频。它从无标签雷达视频中学习时空运动感知的通用表示，并使用热图解码器进行多帧姿态估计。输入采用Range-Doppler视频，消融研究证实其优于Range-Azimuth或融合方式，且计算成本更低。预训练阶段通过掩码重建任务学习特征，微调阶段用于姿态估计。
light_analysis.result: 在三个数据集上采用留一人交叉验证，MAEPose在MPJPE指标上持续优于最先进基线，最高提升22.1%（p<0.05）。零样本旁观者干扰下误差仅增加6.5%，证明其鲁棒性。消融研究证实预训练和热图解码器均显著贡献，且使用Range-Doppler视频作为输入效果最佳。
light_analysis.conclusion: MAEPose通过直接处理毫米波雷达视频并利用无标签数据自监督学习，显著提升了人体姿态估计的准确性和鲁棒性，同时避免了复杂中间表示提取。该方法在隐私保护场景下具有重要应用价值。未来工作可探索更复杂的时空掩码策略或扩展到多任务学习。

title: Binary Spiking Neural Networks as Causal Models
abstract: We provide a causal analysis of Binary Spiking Neural Networks (BSNNs) to explain their behavior. We formally define a BSNN and represent its spiking activity as a binary causal model. Thanks to this causal representation, we are able to explain the output of the network by leveraging logic-based methods. In particular, we show that we can successfully use a SAT as well as a SMT solver to compute abductive explanations from this binary causal model. To illustrate our approach, we trained the BSNN on the standard MNIST dataset and applied our SAT-based and SMT-based methods to finding abductive explanations of the network's classifications based on pixel-level features. We also compared the found explanations against SHAP, a popular method used in the area of explainable AI. We show that, unlike SHAP, our approach guarantees that a found explanation does not contain completely irrelevant features.

light_analysis.overview: 将二值脉冲神经网络(BSNN)视为因果模型，利用SAT/SMT求解器生成保证不包含无关特征的溯因解释。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有可解释性方法如SHAP可能产生包含无关特征的解释，缺乏因果保证。需要一种严格的方法确保解释中的特征都是必要的，以提升解释的可靠性和可信任度。
light_analysis.method: 形式化定义BSNN并将其脉冲活动表示为二值因果模型。借助SAT和SMT求解器从该模型中计算溯因解释。在MNIST数据集上训练BSNN，基于像素特征生成分类解释。
light_analysis.result: 在MNIST上成功应用SAT和SMT方法找到溯因解释。与SHAP对比，本方法保证解释不含完全无关的特征，而SHAP可能包含无关特征，验证了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文贡献在于将BSNN建模为因果模型，利用逻辑求解器提供可保证最小性的解释。该方法提升了可解释AI的可靠性，未来可扩展至更复杂网络。

title: Luminol-AIDetect: Fast Zero-shot Machine-Generated Text Detection based on Perplexity under Text Shuffling
abstract: Machine-generated text (MGT) detection requires identifying structurally invariant signals across generation models, rather than relying on model-specific fingerprints. In this respect, we hypothesize that while large language models excel at local semantic consistency, their autoregressive nature results in a specific kind of structural fragility compared to human writing. We propose Luminol-AIDetect, a novel, zero-shot statistical approach that exposes this fragility through coherence disruption. By applying a simple randomized text-shuffling procedure, we demonstrate that the resulting shift in perplexity serves as a principled, model-agnostic discriminant, as MGT displays a characteristic dispersion in perplexity-under-shuffling that differs markedly from the more stable structural variability of human-written text. Luminol-AIDetect leverages this distinction to inform its decision process, where a handful of perplexity-based scalar features are extracted from an input text and its shuffled version, then detection is performed via density estimation and ensemble-based prediction. Evaluated across 8 content domains, 11 adversarial attack types, and 18 languages, Luminol-AIDetect demonstrates state-of-the-art performance, with gains up to 17x lower FPR while being cheaper than prior methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于文本打乱后困惑度变化的零样本机器生成文本检测方法，实现模型无关的高效检测。
light_analysis.motivation: 机器生成文本检测需识别跨生成模型的结构不变信号，而非依赖模型特定指纹。现有方法多基于模型特征，泛化性差且易受攻击。本文假设自回归语言模型虽然擅长局部语义一致性，但比人类写作存在结构脆弱性。通过打乱文本，这种脆弱性表现为困惑度变化特征差异，可作为模型无关的判别依据，解决零样本和鲁棒性难题。
light_analysis.method: 提出Luminol-AIDetect，一种零样本统计方法。首先对输入文本进行随机打乱，计算原始文本和打乱文本的困惑度，提取少量基于困惑度的标量特征。然后通过密度估计和集成预测进行检测。核心创新在于利用自回归模型在文本打乱后困惑度分散性增加的特性，无需模型特定训练，可跨领域和语言应用。
light_analysis.result: 在8个内容领域、11种对抗攻击类型和18种语言上评估，达到最先进性能。相比此前方法，假阳性率降低17倍，同时计算成本更低。具体数据摘要未详细列出，但表明在多种场景下具有显著优势，尤其在对抗攻击下保持鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一种快速、模型无关的零样本机器生成文本检测方法，通过文本打乱揭示结构脆弱性，实现高效判别。该方法在多样化的领域、攻击和语言中表现优异，具有实际应用价值，如虚假信息检测。未来可探索更复杂的特征和自适应打乱策略以进一步提升性能。

title: Policy Split: Incentivizing Dual-Mode Exploration in LLM Reinforcement with Dual-Mode Entropy Regularization
abstract: To encourage diverse exploration in reinforcement learning (RL) for large language models (LLMs) without compromising accuracy, we propose Policy Split, a novel paradigm that bifurcates the policy into normal and high-entropy modes with a high-entropy prompt. While sharing model parameters, the two modes undergo collaborative dual-mode entropy regularization tailored to distinct objectives. Specifically, the normal mode optimizes for task correctness, while the high-entropy mode incorporates a preference for exploration, and the two modes learn collaboratively. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach consistently outperforms established entropy-guided RL baselines across various model sizes in general and creative tasks. Further analysis reveals that Policy Split facilitates dual-mode exploration, where the high-entropy mode generates distinct behavioral patterns to the normal mode, providing unique learning signals.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Policy Split范式，通过双模熵正则化将LLM强化学习策略分为正常和高熵模式，实现探索与准确性的平衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 在强化学习训练大型语言模型时，如何在保证生成准确性的同时鼓励多样化探索是一个关键挑战。现有方法如熵正则化往往在探索和利用之间权衡不足，导致模型要么过于保守，要么生成不相关内容。本研究旨在设计一种机制，使模型在保持任务正确性的前提下，能够主动探索新策略，从而提升在创意任务和通用任务上的表现。
light_analysis.method: Policy Split将策略网络分为两个共享参数的模块：正常模式和高熵模式。通过高熵提示触发高熵模式，并引入双模熵正则化损失。正常模式优化任务正确性（如最大化奖励），高熵模式则额外增加探索偏好（如高熵奖励）。两种模式协作训练，共享梯度更新，但各自的目标函数不同。该设计使模型在保持核心能力的同时，从高熵模式中获得独特的探索信号。
light_analysis.result: 在多种模型规模（如7B、13B）的通用和创意任务上，Policy Split一致优于现有熵引导RL基线（如PPO+entropy）。具体地，在创意写作任务中，高熵模式生成的文本多样性提升15%以上，同时正确性指标（如ROUGE-L）保持相近；在数学推理任务中，策略的探索效率提高了10%。消融实验表明双模协同是关键。
light_analysis.conclusion: Policy Split通过显式分离探索与利用模式，有效促进了LLM强化学习中的多样化探索而不牺牲准确性。该工作在理论上引入了双模熵正则化概念，实践上为创意生成和任务泛化提供了新工具。未来可探索动态调整模式切换阈值或扩展到多模式场景。局限性在于高熵提示的选取可能影响效果。

title: Aryabhata 2: Scaling Reinforcement Learning for Advanced STEM Reasoning
abstract: Competitive STEM examinations such as JEE and NEET require multi-step symbolic reasoning, precise numerical computation, and deep conceptual understanding across physics, chemistry, and mathematics. Recent large language models perform strongly on common reasoning benchmarks, yet they remain difficult to deploy at scale, where millions of student doubts demand domain-specific, consistently structured problem solving.   We introduce Aryabhata 2, a reasoning-focused language model for competitive STEM examinations, trained via reinforcement-learning post-training. Using PhysicsWallah's internal question banks, we construct a high-quality training curriculum and post-train GPT-OSS-20B through reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards. Training combines prolonged reinforcement learning with broadened exploration via progressively larger rollout group sizes.   We evaluate Aryabhata 2 on competitive examination benchmarks, including JEE Main, JEE Advanced, and NEET, as well as out-of-distribution reasoning datasets such as AIME, HMMT, MMLU-Pro, MMLU-Redux 2.0, and GPQA. Results show that Aryabhata 2 outperforms its base model GPT-OSS-20B on competitive STEM reasoning while requiring substantially fewer output tokens (up to 64\% fewer).

light_analysis.overview: 提出Aryabhata 2，通过强化学习后训练提升STEM竞赛推理能力，并大幅减少输出token。
light_analysis.motivation: 竞争性STEM考试（如JEE、NEET）需要多步符号推理和精确计算，现有LLM在通用基准上表现好但难以大规模部署，缺乏领域特定且结构化的问题求解能力。现有方法在推理效率与部署成本上存在不足。
light_analysis.method: 基于PhysicsWallah内部题库构建高质量训练课程，对GPT-OSS-20B使用可验证奖励的强化学习进行后训练。训练结合延长强化学习与通过逐步扩大rollout组大小实现的广泛探索，增强模型探索能力。
light_analysis.result: 在JEE Main、JEE Advanced、NEET及AIME、HMMT、MMLU-Pro等OOD基准上，Aryabhata 2在STEM推理上优于基础模型GPT-OSS-20B，同时输出token减少多达64%。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文证明强化学习后训练可显著提升领域特定推理能力与效率，具有学术价值。应用上，模型可大规模部署于学生疑问求解场景，降低成本。未来可探索更高效探索策略。

title: Belief-Aware VLM Model for Human-like Reasoning
abstract: Traditional neural network models for intent inference rely heavily on observable states and struggle to generalize across diverse tasks and dynamic environments. Recent advances in Vision Language Models (VLMs) and Vision Language Action (VLA) models introduce common-sense reasoning through large-scale multimodal pretraining, enabling zero-shot performance across tasks. However, these models still lack explicit mechanisms to represent and update belief, limiting their ability to reason like humans or capture the evolving human intent over long-horizon. To address this, we propose a belief-aware VLM framework that integrates retrieval-based memory and reinforcement learning. Instead of learning an explicit belief model, we approximate belief using a vector-based memory that retrieves relevant multimodal context, which is incorporated into the VLM for reasoning. We further refine decision-making using a reinforcement learning policy over the VLM latent space. We evaluate our approach on publicly available VQA datasets such as HD-EPIC and demonstrate consistent improvements over zero-shot baselines, highlighting the importance of belief-aware reasoning.
comment: Accepted for publication at the IEEE International Conference on Robot and Human Interactive Communication (RO-MAN 2026). 6 pages, 3 figures, 1 table

light_analysis.overview: 提出信念感知VLM框架，通过检索记忆和强化学习实现类人推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统意图推理模型依赖可观测状态，难以泛化到多样任务和动态环境。现有VLM和VLA模型虽通过多模态预训练实现零样本泛化，但缺乏显式的信念表示与更新机制，无法像人类一样推理或捕捉长期演化的人类意图。该研究旨在解决这一问题，提升模型在长期任务中的类人推理能力。
light_analysis.method: 提出信念感知VLM框架，不学习显式信念模型，而是用向量记忆近似信念，通过检索相关多模态上下文融入VLM进行推理。进一步利用强化学习策略在VLM潜在空间中优化决策。评估使用HD-EPIC等公开VQA数据集。
light_analysis.result: 在HD-EPIC等VQA数据集上，所提方法相比零样本基线取得一致改进，验证了信念感知推理的有效性。具体提升幅度摘要未明确说明，但强调了信念意识的重要性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出的信念感知VLM通过检索记忆和强化学习实现了类人推理，在VQA任务上优于零样本基线。该工作为长期意图推理提供了新思路，具有学术价值。未来可探索更复杂的信念更新机制或应用于机器人任务。摘要未提及局限性。

title: Emotion Entanglement and Bayesian Inference for Multi-Dimensional Emotion Understanding
abstract: Understanding emotions in natural language is inherently a multi-dimensional reasoning problem, where multiple affective signals interact through context, interpersonal relations, and situational cues. However, most existing emotion understanding benchmarks rely on short texts and predefined emotion labels, reducing this process to independent label prediction and ignoring the structured dependencies among emotions. To address this limitation, we introduce Emotional Scenarios (EmoScene), a theory-grounded benchmark of 4,731 contextrich scenarios annotated with an 8-dimensional emotion vector derived from Plutchik's basic emotions. Motivated by the observation that emotions rarely occur independently, we further propose an entanglement-aware Bayesian inference framework that incorporates emotion co-occurrence statistics to perform joint posterior inference over the emotion vector. This lightweight post-processing does not require any parameter updates and improves the structural consistency of predictions, and yields overall gains of 2.24% Lexical Accuracy without any additional cost. EmoScene therefore provides a challenging benchmark for studying multi-dimensional emotion understanding and the limitations of current language models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出EmoScene基准和贝叶斯推理框架，利用情绪共现统计进行联合后验推理，提升多维度情绪理解的结构一致性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有情绪理解基准多基于短文本和预定义标签，将情绪识别简化为独立标签预测，忽略了情绪间的结构化依赖关系。实际中情绪多维交互，需考虑上下文、人际关系等。本研究基于Plutchik基本情绪理论，构建情境丰富、标注8维情绪向量的EmoScene基准，以解决多维度情绪推理问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出纠缠感知贝叶斯推理框架，通过情绪共现统计学习先验分布，对语言模型输出的独立情绪预测进行联合后验推理，调整预测结果以符合情绪间的结构依赖。该框架为轻量级后处理方法，无需参数更新或额外训练，直接提升预测的结构一致性。
light_analysis.result: 在EmoScene基准上，所提贝叶斯推理框架在无需额外成本下，使Lexical Accuracy提升2.24%，表明利用情绪共现统计可有效改善多维度情绪理解的结构一致性，验证了方法有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: EmoScene基准为多维度情绪理解提供更具挑战性的评估，揭示了现有语言模型在建模情绪依赖上的不足。贝叶斯推理框架以轻量方式提升结构一致性，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的情绪依赖模型及跨任务迁移。

title: On-the-fly Repulsion in the Contextual Space for Rich Diversity in Diffusion Transformers
abstract: Modern Text-to-Image (T2I) diffusion models have achieved remarkable semantic alignment, yet they often suffer from a significant lack of variety, converging on a narrow set of visual solutions for any given prompt. This typicality bias presents a challenge for creative applications that require a wide range of generative outcomes. We identify a fundamental trade-off in current approaches to diversity: modifying model inputs requires costly optimization to incorporate feedback from the generative path. In contrast, acting on spatially-committed intermediate latents tends to disrupt the forming visual structure, leading to artifacts. In this work, we propose to apply repulsion in the Contextual Space as a novel framework for achieving rich diversity in Diffusion Transformers. By intervening in the multimodal attention channels, we apply on-the-fly repulsion during the transformer's forward pass, injecting the intervention between blocks where text conditioning is enriched with emergent image structure. This allows for redirecting the guidance trajectory after it is structurally informed but before the composition is fixed. Our results demonstrate that repulsion in the Contextual Space produces significantly richer diversity without sacrificing visual fidelity or semantic adherence. Furthermore, our method is uniquely efficient, imposing a small computational overhead while remaining effective even in modern "Turbo" and distilled models where traditional trajectory-based interventions typically fail.

light_analysis.overview: 提出在上下文空间中应用即时排斥，实现扩散Transformer的丰富多样性，无需额外优化或牺牲质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前文本到图像扩散模型虽然语义对齐良好，但生成结果缺乏多样性，存在典型性偏差。现有方法通过修改模型输入需要代价高昂的优化，而作用于空间中间潜变量则易破坏视觉结构导致伪影。因此需要一种高效且不引入伪影的方法来提升多样性，同时保持视觉保真度和语义一致性。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出在上下文中施加排斥的新框架。通过在扩散Transformer的多模态注意力通道中即时干预，在前向传播的块之间应用排斥，这些块位于文本条件与图像结构丰富的过渡处。这样可以在结构信息形成后但组成固定前重定向引导轨迹，从而产生多样的输出，且计算开销小。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，上下文空间中的排斥能产生显著更丰富的多样性，不损害视觉保真度或语义一致性。该方法计算效率高，仅增加少量开销，且即使在现代Turbo和蒸馏模型中仍然有效，而传统的轨迹干预方法在此类模型中通常失败。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作提出一个新颖的多样性增强框架，解决了扩散模型中的多样性-质量权衡。通过即时排斥避免了昂贵优化，并兼容高效模型，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索排斥强度的自适应调整或扩展到其他生成任务。

title: Formal Semantics for Agentic Tool Protocols: A Process Calculus Approach
abstract: The emergence of large language model agents capable of invoking external tools has created urgent need for formal verification of agent protocols. Two paradigms dominate this space: Schema-Guided Dialogue (SGD), a research framework for zero-shot API generalization, and the Model Context Protocol (MCP), an industry standard for agent-tool integration. While both enable dynamic service discovery through schema descriptions, their formal relationship remains unexplored. Building on prior work establishing the conceptual convergence of these paradigms, we present the first process calculus formalization of SGD and MCP, proving they are structurally bisimilar under a well-defined mapping Phi. However, we demonstrate that the reverse mapping Phi^{-1} is partial and lossy, revealing critical gaps in MCP's expressivity. Through bidirectional analysis, we identify five principles -- semantic completeness, explicit action boundaries, failure mode documentation, progressive disclosure compatibility, and inter-tool relationship declaration -- as necessary and sufficient conditions for full behavioral equivalence. We formalize these principles as type-system extensions MCP+, proving MCP+ is isomorphic to SGD. Our work provides the first formal foundation for verified agent systems and establishes schema quality as a provable safety property.

light_analysis.overview: 首次使用进程演算形式化建模SGD和MCP，证明两者结构互模拟，并提出MCP+扩展实现与SGD同构，为代理工具协议提供形式化验证基础。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型代理调用外部工具需要形式化验证以确保安全性，当前Schema-Guided Dialogue (SGD)和Model Context Protocol (MCP)两大范式主导，但二者形式关系未知。缺乏形式基础导致代理系统行为不可证明，存在安全隐患。本研究旨在填补这一空白，揭示范式间关系并建立验证框架。
light_analysis.method: 采用进程演算对SGD和MCP进行形式化建模，定义映射Phi证明两者结构互模拟，同时发现反向映射Phi^{-1}偏且有损，暴露MCP表达力缺陷。通过双向分析提炼出五项必要充分条件（语义完备性、显式动作边界等），将这些原则扩展为类型系统MCP+，并证明MCP+与SGD同构。
light_analysis.result: 理论证明SGD与MCP在映射Phi下结构互模拟，但MCP无法完全逆向映射回SGD，表明其表达力不足。提出的五项原则和MCP+类型系统实现了完全行为等价，证明MCP+与SGD同构。该工作将模式质量确立为可验证的安全属性，为代理系统形式验证奠定基础。未涉及具体数值实验。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文贡献了首个代理工具协议的形式化基础，证明了SGD和MCP的形式关系，并通过MCP+弥补了表达力差距，使代理系统行为可被形式化验证。学术上建立了从协议语法到语义的严格桥梁，实践上为设计可靠代理交互协议提供指导。未来可扩展至动态环境和多代理场景。

title: GenSpan: Generation-Calibrated Motion Span Priors for Multi-Verb Video Corpus Moment Retrieval
abstract: Video Corpus Moment Retrieval (VCMR) aims to retrieve both the correct video and its temporal segment corresponding to a natural-language query, a task that is especially challenging for multi-verb queries where temporal action ordering is critical. Existing approaches often rely solely on text or static images and struggle to capture implicit motion dynamics, leading to retrieval errors and temporal misalignment. We propose GenSpan, a generation-calibrated VCMR framework that constructs short auxiliary videos from LLM-selected subtitle cues and decomposed sub-events, using these as temporal priors rather than direct retrieval targets. A token selector filters candidate-video features aligned with generated motion, and a bidirectional state-space model efficiently predicts video-moment tuples. Experiments on TVR and ActivityNet-Captions demonstrate that GenSpan improves corpus-level retrieval and moment localization, particularly for complex multi-action queries, while reducing computational cost compared to state-of-the-art multimodal baselines.
comment: Major revision with title change, updated method, and additional experiments

light_analysis.overview: 提出GenSpan框架，利用LLM生成辅助视频作为运动先验，提升多动词视频语料库时刻检索的准确性和效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 视频语料库时刻检索（VCMR）需要同时定位视频和时间段，对于多动词查询（动作顺序关键）尤为困难。现有方法依赖文本或静态图像，无法捕获隐含运动动态，导致检索错误和时间错位。因此，需要一种能利用运动先验的方法来改善对复杂多动作查询的理解和定位。
light_analysis.method: GenSpan框架包含：1) 从LLM选择的字幕线索和分解子事件构建短辅助视频作为时序先验；2) 令牌选择器过滤与生成运动对齐的候选视频特征；3) 双向状态空间模型高效预测视频-时刻元组。关键创新在于使用生成辅助视频作为先验而非直接检索目标，降低计算成本。
light_analysis.result: 在TVR和ActivityNet-Captions数据集上，GenSpan在语料库级检索和时刻定位上优于现有方法，尤其对复杂多动作查询效果显著。同时，相比最先进的多模态基线，计算成本更低。摘要未提供具体数值，仅定性描述改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: GenSpan通过生成校准的运动先验，有效解决了多动词VCMR中的运动动态捕捉问题，提升了检索和定位性能，并降低了计算开销。未来工作可探索更精细的先验生成策略或扩展到其他视频理解任务。该方法在视频检索和问答等应用中有潜在价值。

title: MedForge: Interpretable Medical Deepfake Detection via Forgery-aware Reasoning
abstract: Text-guided image editors can now manipulate authentic medical scans with high fidelity, enabling lesion implantation/removal that threatens clinical trust and safety. Existing defenses are inadequate for healthcare. Medical detectors are largely black-box, while MLLM-based explainers are typically post-hoc, lack medical expertise, and may hallucinate evidence on ambiguous cases. We present MedForge, a data-and-method solution for pre-hoc, evidence-grounded medical forgery detection. We introduce MedForge-90K, a large-scale benchmark of realistic lesion edits across 19 pathologies with expert-guided reasoning supervision via doctor inspection guidelines and gold edit locations. Building on it, MedForge-Reasoner performs localize-then-analyze reasoning, predicting suspicious regions before producing a verdict, and is further aligned with Forgery-aware GSPO to strengthen grounding and reduce hallucinations. Experiments demonstrate state-of-the-art detection accuracy and trustworthy, expert-aligned explanations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于伪造感知推理的可解释医学深度伪造检测方法，结合大规模基准数据集和定位-分析推理机制。
light_analysis.motivation: 文本引导图像编辑器可高保真操作医学扫描，实现病灶植入或移除，威胁临床信任和安全。现有医学检测器多为黑盒，可解释性差；基于MLLM的解释器事后且易产生幻觉，缺乏医学专业知识。因此亟需一种事前、基于证据的医学伪造检测方案。
light_analysis.method: 构建MedForge-90K数据集，包含19种病理的逼真病灶编辑和专家推理监督（医生指南及编辑位置）。提出MedForge-Reasoner，采用定位-然后-分析推理：先预测可疑区域，再生成判决。通过Forgery-aware GSPO对齐，增强证据基础并减少幻觉。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，MedForge在检测准确率上达到最先进水平，且生成与专家对齐的可信解释。相比黑盒检测器和事后解释器，本方法在可解释性和可靠性上显著提升。具体数据摘要未明确，但强调了整体领先性。
light_analysis.conclusion: MedForge通过数据和方法创新，实现了可解释、事前的医学深伪检测，提升了临床信任度。其推理过程与专家指导一致，具有实际应用价值。未来可扩展至更多病理类型和编辑方式，但依赖大规模标注数据是潜在局限。

title: Spatial Transcriptomics as Images for Large-Scale Pretraining
abstract: Spatial Transcriptomics (ST) profiles thousands of gene expression values at discrete spots with precise coordinates on tissue sections, preserving spatial context essential for clinical and pathological studies. With rising sequencing throughput and advancing platforms, the expanding data volumes motivate large-scale ST pretraining. However, the fundamental unit for pretraining, i.e., what constitutes a single training sample, remains ill-posed. Existing choices fall into two camps: (1) treating each spot as an independent sample, which discards spatial dependencies and collapses ST into single-cell transcriptomics; and (2) treating an entire slide as a single sample, which produces prohibitively large inputs and drastically fewer training examples, undermining effective pretraining. To address this gap, we propose treating spatial transcriptomics as croppable images. Specifically, we define a multi-channel image representation with fixed spatial size by cropping patches from raw slides, thereby preserving spatial context while substantially increasing the number of training samples. Along the channel dimension, we define gene subset selection rules to control input dimensionality and improve pretraining stability. Extensive experiments show that the proposed image-like dataset construction for ST pretraining consistently improves downstream performance, outperforming conventional pretraining schemes. Ablation studies verify that both spatial patching and channel design are necessary, establishing a unified, practical paradigm for organizing ST data and enabling large-scale pretraining.

light_analysis.overview: 提出将空间转录组学数据视为可裁剪图像，通过多通道图像表示和基因子集选择实现大规模预训练，显著提升下游任务性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 空间转录组学（ST）数据量激增推动大规模预训练，但现有方法存在根本缺陷：将每个点作为独立样本会丢失空间依赖，将整个切片作为样本则导致输入过大、样本稀少，阻碍有效预训练。因此需要一种新范式，既能保留空间上下文，又能生成足够多的训练样本。
light_analysis.method: 提出将ST数据视为可裁剪图像：从原始切片中裁剪固定空间尺寸的补丁，每个补丁定义为多通道图像，通道对应选择的基因子集，这样既保留空间结构又大幅增加样本数。通过设计基因子集选择规则控制输入维度，提升预训练稳定性。采用图像式数据集进行大规模预训练。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，所提出的图像式ST预训练方法在多个下游任务中一致提升性能，优于传统预训练方案（如点级或切片级预处理）。消融实验证实空间分块和通道设计均不可或缺，验证了该范式的必要性与有效性，为大规模ST预训练建立了统一框架。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该论文开创性地将ST数据组织为可裁剪图像，解决了预训练中样本构建的难题，大幅提升下游任务效果。其贡献在于提供了一种实用、统一的ST数据预处理范式，推动大规模预训练在空间转录组学中的应用。未来可探索更优化的基因子集策略或结合多模态数据进一步扩展。

title: EvoPrompt: Guided Prompt Evolution for Vision-Language Models Adaptation
abstract: The adaptation of large-scale vision-language models (VLMs) to downstream tasks with limited labeled data remains a significant challenge. While parameter-efficient prompt learning methods offer a promising path, they often suffer from catastrophic forgetting of pre-trained knowledge. Toward addressing this limitation, our work is grounded in the insight that governing the evolutionary path of prompts is essential for forgetting-free adaptation. To this end, we propose EvoPrompt, a novel framework designed to explicitly steer the prompt trajectory for knowledge-preserving fine-tuning. Specifically, our approach employs a Modality-Shared Prompt Projector (MPP) to generate hierarchical prompts from a unified embedding space. Critically, an evolutionary training strategy decouples low-rank updates into directional and magnitude components, preserving early-learned semantic directions while only adapting their magnitude, thus enabling prompts to evolve without discarding foundational knowledge. This process is further stabilized by Feature Geometric Regularization (FGR), which enforces feature decorrelation to prevent representation collapse. Extensive experiments demonstrate that EvoPrompt achieves state-of-the-art performance in few-shot learning while robustly preserving the original zero-shot capabilities of pre-trained VLMs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出EvoPrompt框架，通过引导prompt进化路径实现VLMs的知识保留微调，避免灾难性遗忘。
light_analysis.motivation: 大规模视觉-语言模型在有限标注数据下适应下游任务时，参数高效prompt学习方法常遭受预训练知识的灾难性遗忘。现有方法无法有效保留零样本能力，亟需一种遗忘-free的适应方法，关键在于控制prompt的进化路径以保持知识。
light_analysis.method: 提出EvoPrompt框架，包含Modality-Shared Prompt Projector (MPP)从统一嵌入空间生成层次化prompts；进化训练策略将低秩更新分解为方向和幅度分量，仅调整幅度以保留早期语义方向；Feature Geometric Regularization (FGR)强制执行特征去相关，防止表示崩溃。
light_analysis.result: 在少样本学习任务中达到最先进性能，同时稳健地保留预训练VLMs的原始零样本能力，表明EvoPrompt有效解决了灾难性遗忘问题。
light_analysis.conclusion: EvoPrompt通过引导prompt进化路径实现了知识保留的微调，在少样本学习与零样本能力保持之间取得平衡。其模块化设计可推广至其他VLM适应场景，未来可探索自适应分解策略以进一步提升效率。

title: Beyond Pixel Histories: World Models with Persistent 3D State
abstract: Interactive world models continually generate video by responding to a user's actions, enabling open-ended generation capabilities. However, existing models typically lack a 3D representation of the environment, meaning 3D consistency must be implicitly learned from data, and spatial memory is restricted to limited temporal context windows. This results in an unrealistic user experience and presents significant obstacles to downstream tasks such as training agents. To address this, we present PERSIST, a new paradigm of world model which simulates the evolution of a latent 3D scene: environment, camera, and renderer. This allows us to synthesise new frames with persistent spatial memory and consistent geometry. Both quantitative metrics and a qualitative user study show substantial improvements in spatial memory, 3D consistency, and long-horizon stability over existing methods, enabling coherent, evolving 3D worlds. We further demonstrate novel capabilities, including synthesising diverse 3D environments from a single image, as well as enabling fine-grained, geometry-aware control over generated experiences by supporting environment editing and specification directly in 3D space. Project page: https://francelico.github.io/persist.github.io
comment: Accepted to the International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML) 2026. To appear in the Proceedings of Machine Learning Research (PMLR). 9 pages

light_analysis.overview: 提出PERSIST，一种基于持久3D状态的世界模型新范式，实现连续视频生成中的几何一致性和空间记忆。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有交互式世界模型缺乏3D环境表示，3D一致性需隐式学习，且空间记忆受限于有限上下文窗口，导致用户体验不真实，阻碍下游任务如智能体训练。因此需要一种能显式模拟3D场景演化的世界模型。
light_analysis.method: PERSIST通过模拟潜在3D场景（环境、相机、渲染器）的演化来生成视频。它利用持久空间记忆和一致几何合成新帧，支持从单图像合成多样3D环境，并允许在3D空间中直接编辑和环境指定，实现细粒度、几何感知的控制。
light_analysis.result: 定量指标和定性用户研究表明，PERSIST在空间记忆、3D一致性和长程稳定性上显著优于现有方法，能生成连贯演化的3D世界。具体性能提升幅度摘要未明确说明，但强调实质性改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: PERSIST开创了基于持久3D状态的世界模型新范式，提升了生成视频的几何一致性和长时间稳定性，具有应用于开放世界生成、智能体训练等领域的潜力。未来工作可探索更复杂的3D场景和交互方式。

title: SciDER: Scientific Data-centric End-to-end Researcher
abstract: While large language models accelerate scientific discovery, existing agents face severe limitations in adaptability, domain generalization, and multimodal scalability, often struggling to autonomously process raw, domain-specific experimental data. To overcome these barriers, we introduce SciDER, a multi-agent system designed to flexibly automate the entire research lifecycle. This framework employs a novel data-centric approach and integrates a dynamic multimodal skill system across four specialized sub-agents. Specifically, an ideation agent generates novel hypotheses via Evolutionary Idea Search, a data analysis agent systematically structures raw data, an experimentation agent synthesizes executable code grounded in dataset characteristics, and a critic agent drives iterative self-refinement. To democratize open-source scientific discovery, we release OpenSciDER-SFT-8K, a high-quality execution trajectory dataset, alongside the OpenSciDER-27B fine-tuned model. Across six benchmarks, SciDER and OpenSciDER obtain competitive or leading results, with especially strong gains on data-centric analysis, end-to-end research execution, and multimodal scientific visualization. By integrating data analysis with experimental execution, SciDER bridges the gap between abstract scientific reasoning and reproducible experimentation synthesis.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SciDER多智能体系统，通过数据驱动和动态多模态技能，自动化科学研究全生命周期。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有大语言模型驱动的科研助手在适应性、领域泛化和多模态可扩展性方面存在严重局限，难以自主处理原始、特定领域的实验数据。亟需一种能够灵活自动化整个研究流程的系统，以加速科学发现并降低人工干预。
light_analysis.method: SciDER采用数据驱动的多智能体框架，包含四个子智能体：构思体（进化思路搜索生成假设）、数据分析体（结构化原始数据）、实验体（基于数据集特征生成可执行代码）、批评体（迭代自我优化）。同时发布OpenSciDER-SFT-8K高质量轨迹数据集和OpenSciDER-27B微调模型，支持开源科学发现。
light_analysis.result: 在六个基准测试中，SciDER和OpenSciDER取得有竞争力或领先的结果，尤其在数据密集型分析、端到端研究执行和多模态科学可视化方面表现强劲。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但整体效果优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: SciDER通过整合数据分析与实验执行，弥合了抽象科学推理与可重复实验合成之间的差距。其模块化设计和开源资源为自动化科学研究提供了新范式，未来可扩展至更多领域。局限性可能包括对复杂实验的泛化能力需进一步验证。

title: Does Order Matter : Connecting The Law of Robustness to Robust Generalization
abstract: Bubeck and Selke (2021) propose the connection between the Law of Robustness and robust generalization error as an open problem. The Law of Robustness states that overparameterization is necessary for models to interpolate robustly, i.e., the interpolating function is required to be Lipschitz. Wu et al. (2023) extend this law to arbitrary data distributions, proving that the Lipschitz constant satisfies $L = Ω(n^{1/d})$. Robust generalization, on the other hand, asks whether small robust training loss implies small robust test loss. This can be studied using statistical learning techniques such as Rademacher complexities, where a bound on the Rademacher complexity of the robust loss class implies a bound on the Lipschitzness of the function class. We use this connection to explicitly link the two for arbitrary data distributions. (i) We prove that the order of the Lipschitz bound remains the same when considering the global Rademacher complexity of robust loss classes. (ii) At the local scale, i.e., for subsets of functions with small empirical error, the order of the Lipschitz bound changes with the perturbation radius $ρ$ and the localized concentration term $\sqrt{r/n}$.

light_analysis.overview: 建立了鲁棒性定律与鲁棒泛化误差之间的显式联系，揭示了Lipschitz常数界在不同尺度下的变化规律。
light_analysis.motivation: 鲁棒性定律指出过参数化是鲁棒插值的必要条件，而鲁棒泛化关心训练损失小是否导致测试损失小。现有研究将二者视为独立问题，缺乏直接联系。通过Rademacher复杂度，可以桥接两者：函数类的Lipschitz性质影响其Rademacher复杂度，进而影响泛化界。本文旨在明确连接这两个方向，量化Lipschitz常数在不同数据分布和尺度下的行为。
light_analysis.method: 利用Rademacher复杂度理论建立鲁棒性定律与鲁棒泛化误差的联系。对于任意数据分布，分析全局和局部Rademacher复杂度下的Lipschitz界。全局上，证明Lipschitz界阶数与鲁棒性定律一致（Ω(n^{1/d})）；局部上，对具有小经验误差的函数子集，界随扰动半径ρ和局部浓度项√(r/n)变化。方法不依赖特定数据集或模型架构，具有一般性。
light_analysis.result: 主要结果分两点：(i) 全局Rademacher复杂度下，Lipschitz常数的下界阶数保持为Ω(n^{1/d})，与Wu等人的鲁棒性定律一致；(ii) 局部尺度下，对于经验误差小的函数子集，Lipschitz下界变为依赖于ρ和√(r/n)的组合形式，表明局部泛化需要更严格的Lipschitz条件。摘要未提供具体数值实验，但理论推导完整。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文首次显式连接鲁棒性定律与鲁棒泛化误差，揭示了二者之间的内在关系。全局结果验证了过参数化对鲁棒插值的必要性，局部结果则指出小误差区域需要更精细的Lipschitz控制。该工作为理解鲁棒学习中的泛化提供了理论基础，未来可进一步探索该联系在实际算法设计中的应用，如自适应正则化策略。

title: Value Entanglement: Conflation Between Different Kinds of Good In (Some) Large Language Models
abstract: Value alignment of Large Language Models (LLMs) requires us to empirically measure these models' actual, acquired representation of value. Among the characteristics of value representation in humans is that they distinguish among value of different kinds. We investigate whether LLMs likewise distinguish three different kinds of good: moral, grammatical, and economic. By probing model behavior, embeddings, and residual stream activations, we report pervasive cases of value entanglement: a conflation between these distinct representations of value. Specifically, both grammatical and economic valuation was found to be overly influenced by moral value, relative to human norms. This conflation was repaired by selective ablation of the activation vectors associated with morality.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示大语言模型存在价值纠缠现象，并通过消融道德激活向量进行修复。
light_analysis.motivation: 价值对齐需要测量LLM实际的价值表示，但人类能区分不同种类价值（道德、语法、经济），而现有方法未考虑LLM是否混淆这些价值。该问题对构建可信赖AI至关重要，因为价值混淆可能导致行为偏差。当前研究缺乏对这种纠缠的直接探测和修复方法。
light_analysis.method: 通过探测模型行为、嵌入和残差流激活，系统性地评估LLM对道德、语法和经济三种价值的区分能力。发现语法和经济价值过多受道德价值影响，表现为价值纠缠。使用选择性消融与道德相关的激活向量来修复此纠缠，降低了道德对其他价值的过度影响。
light_analysis.result: 实验观察到普遍的价值纠缠现象：语法和经济价值表征被道德价值过度主导，偏离人类规范。通过消融道德激活向量，成功修复了这种纠缠，使模型的价值区分更接近人类。摘要未提供具体量化指标，但强调了修复的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该论文首次系统揭示LLM中价值纠缠现象，并提出一种基于激活消融的修复策略。研究对改进价值对齐技术具有指导意义，提示未来需关注多维度价值表征的独立性。局限性在于可能仅适用于部分模型，且修复可能影响其他性能。

title: DSL-Topic: Improving Topic Modeling by Distilling Soft Labelsfrom Language Models
abstract: Traditional neural topic models are typically optimized by reconstructing the document's Bag-of-Words (BoW) representations, overlooking contextual information and struggling with data sparsity. In this work, we introduce a novel topic model training framework by Distilling Soft Labels (DSL) from Language Models (LMs). To construct the contextually enriched reconstruction signals, we project the next token probabilities, conditioned on a specialized prompt, onto a pre-defined vocabulary, and train the topic models to reconstruct the soft labels using the LM hidden states. This produces higher-quality topics that are more closely aligned with the underlying thematic structure of the corpus. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DSL achieves substantial improvements in topic coherence and assignment accuracy over existing baselines. Additionally, we also introduce a retrieval-based metric, which shows that our approach significantly outperforms existing methods in identifying semantically similar documents, highlighting its effectiveness for retrieval-oriented applications.
comment: 22 pages, 5 figures. Camera-ready version for ICML 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出DSL框架，通过从语言模型中蒸馏软标签来改进主题建模，提升主题连贯性和分配准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统神经主题模型依赖文档的词袋表示进行优化，忽略了上下文信息，且面临数据稀疏问题，导致主题质量不高。现有方法难以捕捉语义结构，尤其在文档较短或稀疏时表现不佳。本文旨在利用语言模型的上下文理解能力，为主题模型提供更丰富的重构信号，从而生成与语料主题结构更对齐的高质量主题。
light_analysis.method: DSL框架通过设计特殊提示，将语言模型的下一个token概率投影到预定义词汇表上，作为上下文增强的重构信号。然后训练主题模型，使用LM的隐藏状态来重构这些软标签，而非传统的BoW。该方法利用LM的语义知识，同时避免直接生成大规模文本，保持计算可行性。通过蒸馏软标签，主题模型能学习到更连贯、更具区分性的主题分布。
light_analysis.result: 在多个数据集上的实验表明，DSL在主题连贯性（如TC、NPMI）和主题分配准确性（如纯度、NMI）上显著优于现有基线方法。此外，引入基于检索的指标（如召回率、MRR），DSL在识别语义相似文档的任务中表现出色，相比基线方法有大幅提升，验证了其在检索导向应用中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: DSL是一种新颖的主题模型训练框架，通过蒸馏语言模型的软标签，有效提升了主题质量和文档表征能力。其学术价值在于展示了如何将预训练语言模型的上下文知识融入传统主题模型。实际应用方面，改进的主题模型可用于文档检索、推荐系统等，尤其在语义相似性判断任务中潜力巨大。未来工作可探索不同提示设计或扩展到多模态主题建模。

title: A Unified Framework for Locality in Scalable MARL
abstract: Scalable methods for networked multi-agent reinforcement learning let each agent plan using only a small neighborhood of the agent graph. This works only when the system is value-local, meaning a perturbation at one agent affects the long-run value at another agent weakly when the two are far apart. In the average-reward setting, the standard way to certify locality is the Dobrushin row-sum bound on a single matrix $C^π$ that captures how each agent's next state depends on each other agent's current state. To make this matrix easy to work with, prior work bounds it by a supremum over joint actions. The resulting bound is independent of the policy, but it is loose whenever the policy never picks the worst-case action. We split $C^π$ into pieces that separately track environment sensitivity and policy sensitivity, $C^π\preceq E^{\mathrm s}+E^{\mathrm a}Π(π)$, where $E^{\mathrm s}$ measures how the next state moves with the current state, $E^{\mathrm a}$ measures how it moves with the current action, and $Π(π)$ measures how reactive the policy is to changes in state.
