The spectral radius of $H^π:= E^{\mathrm s}+E^{\mathrm a}Π(π)$ then controls the decay of the average-reward Poisson solution, and the spectral certificate $ρ(H^π)<1$ is strictly weaker than the row-sum condition $\|H^π\|_\infty<1$ on the same matrix and applies in regimes where policy-independent action-supremum bounds used in prior Dobrushin-style work cannot. For temperature-$τ$ softmax policies we get $Π(π)\le L/(2τ)$, so the softmax temperature directly controls locality. We use this decay result to give a deterministic oracle guarantee for a block-coordinate KL-proximal policy-improvement template whose truncation bias decays exponentially in the message-passing radius $κ$.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个统一框架，通过将价值影响矩阵分解为环境和策略敏感性，从而在可扩展多智能体强化学习中更精确地认证局部性。
light_analysis.motivation: 在可扩展的多智能体强化学习中，每个智能体仅利用小邻域信息进行规划，这要求系统具有价值局部性。现有方法通过Dobrushin行和界限认证局部性，但该界限对联合动作取上确界，导致策略无关且宽松，当策略未选取最坏情况动作时失效。本文旨在解决这一界限过紧的问题，提供更精确的局部性认证。
light_analysis.method: 论文将矩阵C^π分解为环境敏感性E^s和策略敏感性E^a Π(π)两部分，其中E^s测量下一状态随当前状态的变化，E^a测量随当前动作的变化，Π(π)测量策略对状态变化的反应程度。H^π = E^s + E^a Π(π)的谱半径控制平均奖励泊松解的衰减，谱条件ρ(H^π)<1比行和条件更弱，适用于策略无关上确界无法处理的场景。对于温度τ的softmax策略，Π(π)≤L/(2τ)，温度直接控制局部性。
light_analysis.result: 论文给出了确定性Oracle保证，用于块坐标KL近端策略改进模板，其截断偏差随消息传递半径κ指数衰减。谱条件ρ(H^π)<1比传统Dobrushin行和条件更严格弱，在策略不选取最坏情况动作时提供更紧的界限。实验未具体说明，但理论证明了局部性和可扩展性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过分解矩阵提供了更精确的局部性认证，将策略敏感性纳入考虑，使得软max温度等参数可直接控制局部性。该框架适用于平均奖励设定下的多智能体强化学习，具有理论价值和实际应用潜力。未来工作可探索更一般的策略形式及分布式实现。

title: Learning to Remember, Learn, and Forget in Attention-Based Models
abstract: In-Context Learning (ICL) in transformers acts as an online associative memory and is believed to underpin their high performance on complex sequence processing tasks. However, in gated linear attention models, this memory has a fixed capacity and is prone to interference, especially for long sequences. We propose Palimpsa, a self-attention model that views ICL as a continual learning problem that must address a stability-plasticity dilemma. Palimpsa uses Bayesian metaplasticity, where the plasticity of each attention state is tied to an importance state grounded by a prior distribution that captures accumulated knowledge. We demonstrate that various gated linear attention models emerge as specific architecture choices and posterior approximations, and that Mamba2 is a special case of Palimpsa where forgetting dominates. This theoretical link enables the transformation of any non-metaplastic model into a metaplastic one, significantly expanding its memory capacity. Our experiments show that Palimpsa consistently outperforms baselines on the Multi-Query Associative Recall (MQAR) benchmark and on Commonsense Reasoning tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Palimpsa模型，通过贝叶斯元可塑性将上下文学习视为持续学习问题，扩展注意力记忆容量。
light_analysis.motivation: Transformer中的上下文学习（ICL）被视为在线联想记忆，但在门控线性注意力模型中，记忆容量固定且易受干扰，尤其对长序列表现不佳。现有方法未充分考虑稳定性-可塑性困境，导致知识干扰与遗忘。因此，需要一种能动态管理记忆、平衡新知识与旧知识的注意力机制。
light_analysis.method: Palimpsa基于贝叶斯元可塑性框架，将每个注意力状态的 plasticity 与由先验分布引导的重要性状态绑定，先验分布捕获累积知识。该框架统一了多种门控线性注意力模型，Mamba2被证明是Palimpsa中遗忘占主导的特例。通过将非元塑性模型转换为元塑性版本，显著扩展记忆容量。
light_analysis.result: 在Multi-Query Associative Recall（MQAR）基准上，Palimpsa一致优于基线方法。此外，在Commonsense Reasoning任务上也取得更优性能。实验表明，贝叶斯元可塑性机制有效提升了模型的长序列记忆能力和知识利用效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: Palimpsa为注意力模型中的长期记忆管理提供了新视角，将ICL形式化为持续学习。理论贡献在于揭示不同门控注意力架构与贝叶斯后验近似的关系。实际应用上可增强序列处理任务的性能。未来可探索更复杂的先验分布或结合外部记忆机制。

title: Making Expert Reasoning Learnable with Self-Distillation
abstract: Improving the reasoning capabilities of large language models (LLMs) typically relies either on the model's ability to sample a correct solution to be reinforced or the existence of a stronger model able to solve the problem. However, many difficult problems remain intractable for even current frontier models, preventing the extraction of valid training signals. A promising alternative is to leverage high-quality expert human solutions, yet naive imitation of this data fails because it is fundamentally out-of-distribution: expert solutions are typically didactic, containing implicit reasoning gaps intended for human readers rather than computational models. Furthermore, high-quality expert solutions are expensive, necessitating generalizable, sample-efficient training methods. We propose Distribution Aligned Imitation Learning (DAIL), a two-step self-distillation method that bridges the distributional gap by first transforming expert solutions into detailed, in-distribution reasoning traces and then applying a contrastive objective to focus learning on expert insights and methodologies. We find that DAIL can leverage fewer than 1000 high-quality expert solutions to achieve up to 31% pass@128 gains on Qwen2.5-Instruct and Qwen3, double reasoning efficiency, and enable out-of-domain generalization.

light_analysis.overview: 提出分布对齐模仿学习（DAIL），通过两步自蒸馏弥合专家推理与模型分布之间的差距，实现少量专家数据高效提升推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 提升大语言模型推理能力通常依赖模型自身采样或更强模型，但许多难题对前沿模型仍难解决，难以获取有效训练信号。高质量专家方案昂贵且分布外（OOD），简单模仿失败，因其教学式推理隐含人类理解的空白。亟需高效、样本经济的方法利用专家数据。
light_analysis.method: 提出DAIL，两步自蒸馏方法：第一步将专家解决方案转换为详细的、分布内的推理轨迹；第二步应用对比目标，聚焦学习专家见解和方法论。无需强教师模型，仅利用少量（<1000）高质量专家方案，通过分布对齐实现高效模仿学习。
light_analysis.result: 在Qwen2.5-Instruct和Qwen3上，DAIL在pass@128指标上提升高达31%，推理效率翻倍，并表现出跨领域泛化能力。与基线方法对比，显著优于朴素模仿，展示了样本效率和性能优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: DAIL有效利用少量专家数据提升LLM推理能力，弥合分布差距，具有高样本效率和泛化性。未来可探索扩展到更多任务和模型，但依赖专家数据质量，需进一步研究自动化生成。

title: Efficient Adversarial Attacks on High-dimensional Offline Bandits
abstract: Bandit algorithms have recently emerged as a powerful tool for evaluating machine learning models, including generative image models and large language models, by efficiently identifying top-performing candidates without exhaustive comparisons. These methods typically rely on a reward model, often distributed with public weights on platforms such as Hugging Face, to provide feedback to the bandit. While online evaluation is expensive and requires repeated trials, offline evaluation with logged data has become an attractive alternative. However, the adversarial robustness of offline bandit evaluation remains largely unexplored, particularly when an attacker perturbs the reward model (rather than the training data) prior to bandit training. In this work, we fill this gap by investigating, both theoretically and empirically, the vulnerability of offline bandit training to adversarial manipulations of the reward model. We introduce a novel threat model in which an attacker exploits offline data in high-dimensional settings to hijack the bandit's behavior. Starting with linear reward functions and extending to nonlinear models such as ReLU neural networks, we study attacks on two Hugging Face evaluators used for generative model assessment: one measuring aesthetic quality and the other assessing compositional alignment. Our results show that even small, imperceptible perturbations to the reward model's weights can drastically alter the bandit's behavior. From a theoretical perspective, we prove a striking high-dimensional effect: as input dimensionality increases, the perturbation norm required for a successful attack decreases, making modern applications such as image evaluation especially vulnerable. Extensive experiments confirm that naive random perturbations are ineffective, whereas carefully targeted perturbations achieve near-perfect attack success rates ...

light_analysis.overview: 研究离线bandit在高维环境下对奖励模型对抗扰动的脆弱性，并证明输入维度增加时攻击所需扰动减小。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有bandit算法依赖奖励模型进行离线评估，但在线评估成本高昂，离线评估成为替代方案。然而，离线bandit的对抗鲁棒性未被探索，尤其当攻击者扰动奖励模型而非训练数据时。该漏洞在高维应用（如图像评估）中尤为危险，现有方法未考虑此类攻击，因此亟需研究。
light_analysis.method: 提出新颖威胁模型，攻击者利用离线数据在高维设置中劫持bandit行为。从线性奖励函数扩展到非线性模型（ReLU神经网络）。使用两个Hugging Face评估器（美学质量和组合对齐）进行实验。理论证明高维效应：输入维度增加，成功攻击所需扰动范数减小。
light_analysis.result: 小幅度不可察觉的权重扰动可大幅改变bandit行为。理论证明高维效应使高维应用更易受攻击。实验表明随机扰动无效，而精心设计的攻击达到接近完美的成功率。与基线对比，方法在攻击效率上显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了离线bandit评估的严重安全风险，特别是在高维图像评估场景中。研究强调必须开发防御机制以增强鲁棒性。未来工作可探索更复杂的模型架构和自适应防御策略。

title: SUSD: Structured Unsupervised Skill Discovery through State Factorization
abstract: Unsupervised Skill Discovery (USD) aims to autonomously learn a diverse set of skills without relying on extrinsic rewards. One of the most common USD approaches is to maximize the Mutual Information (MI) between skill latent variables and states. However, MI-based methods tend to favor simple, static skills due to their invariance properties, limiting the discovery of dynamic, task-relevant behaviors. Distance-Maximizing Skill Discovery (DSD) promotes more dynamic skills by leveraging state-space distances, yet still fall short in encouraging comprehensive skill sets that engage all controllable factors or entities in the environment. In this work, we introduce SUSD, a novel framework that harnesses the compositional structure of environments by factorizing the state space into independent components (e.g., objects or controllable entities). SUSD allocates distinct skill variables to different factors, enabling more fine-grained control on the skill discovery process. A dynamic model also tracks learning across factors, adaptively steering the agent's focus toward underexplored factors. This structured approach not only promotes the discovery of richer and more diverse skills, but also yields a factorized skill representation that enables fine-grained and disentangled control over individual entities which facilitates efficient training of compositional downstream tasks via Hierarchical Reinforcement Learning (HRL). Our experimental results across three environments, with factors ranging from 1 to 10, demonstrate that our method can discover diverse and complex skills without supervision, significantly outperforming existing unsupervised skill discovery methods in factorized and complex environments. Code is publicly available at: https://github.com/hadi-hosseini/SUSD.
comment: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出SUSD框架，通过状态因子化实现结构化无监督技能发现，提升技能多样性和细粒度控制。
light_analysis.motivation: 无监督技能发现（USD）旨在无需外部奖励自主学习多样化技能。现有基于互信息的方法倾向于发现简单静态技能，而基于距离的方法虽能促进动态技能，但仍难以覆盖环境中所有可控因子。为解决这一问题，SUSD利用环境的组合结构，将状态空间分解为独立组件，从而引导技能发现过程关注所有可控实体。
light_analysis.method: SUSD通过状态因子化将状态空间分解为独立因子（如对象或可控实体），为不同因子分配独立的技能变量，实现细粒度控制。引入动态模型跟踪各因子的学习进度，自适应引导代理关注未充分探索的因子。该方法不仅产生更丰富多样的技能，还得到因子化的技能表示，支持层次强化学习（HRL）高效训练组合下游任务。
light_analysis.result: 在三个环境（因子数1-10）中实验，SUSD能无监督发现多样复杂技能，显著优于现有无监督技能发现方法。在因子化和复杂环境中，SUSD在技能覆盖率和下游任务性能上均表现出色，具体指标如成功率提升（摘要未明确数值）。代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: SUSD通过状态因子化实现了结构化无监督技能发现，解决了现有方法忽视环境组合结构的问题。其因子化技能表示有利于细粒度控制和层次化学习，具有重要学术价值。未来可探索更复杂的因子分解策略及在真实世界场景中的应用。

title: Culturally Grounded Personas in Large Language Models: Characterization and Alignment with Socio-Psychological Value Frameworks
abstract: Despite the growing utility of Large Language Models (LLMs) for simulating human behavior, the extent to which these synthetic personas accurately reflect world and moral value systems across different cultural conditionings remains uncertain. This paper investigates the alignment of synthetic, culturally-grounded personas with established frameworks, specifically the World Values Survey (WVS), the Inglehart-Welzel Cultural Map, and Moral Foundations Theory. We conceptualize and produce LLM-generated personas based on a set of interpretable WVS-derived variables, and we examine the generated personas through three complementary lenses: positioning on the Inglehart-Welzel map, which unveils their interpretation reflecting stable differences across cultural conditionings; demographic-level consistency with the World Values Survey, where response distributions broadly track human group patterns; and moral profiles derived from a Moral Foundations questionnaire, which we analyze through a culture-to-morality mapping to characterize how moral responses vary across different cultural configurations. Our approach of culturally-grounded persona generation and analysis enables evaluation of cross-cultural structure and moral variation.

light_analysis.overview: 探究大语言模型生成的文化角色与世界价值观调查等框架的对齐程度。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型用于模拟人类行为日益普遍，但其合成角色能否准确反映不同文化条件下的世界和道德价值体系尚不确定。现有方法缺乏对跨文化背景的系统评估，因此需要研究LLM角色与文化价值框架的一致性，以确保模型生成的角色具有文化代表性。
light_analysis.method: 基于世界价值观调查(WVS)的可解释变量生成LLM角色，并通过三个视角分析：在Inglehart-Welzel文化地图上的定位、与WVS人口层面一致性的比较、以及基于道德基础问卷的道德概况。采用文化到道德的映射来刻画不同文化配置下的道德响应变化。
light_analysis.result: 生成的合成角色在Inglehart-Welzel地图上的定位反映了不同文化条件间的稳定差异；响应分布与WVS中人类群体模式大体一致；道德概况分析揭示了文化配置对道德响应的影响。摘要未提供具体数值指标，但总体表明方法能有效捕捉跨文化结构。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出了文化角色生成与分析框架，可评估LLM角色中的跨文化结构和道德变化。这有助于提升LLM在跨文化情景中的模拟真实性，为文化敏感的AI应用提供基础。未来可扩展至更多文化维度和价值框架。

title: L$^3$: Large Lookup Layers
abstract: Modern sparse language models typically achieve sparsity through Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) layers, which dynamically route tokens to dense MLP "experts." However, dynamic hard routing has a number of drawbacks, such as potentially poor hardware efficiency and needing auxiliary losses for stable training. In contrast, the tokenizer embedding table, which is natively sparse, largely avoids these issues by selecting a single embedding per token at the cost of not having contextual information. In this work, we introduce the Large Lookup Layer (L$^3$), which generalizes embedding tables to model decoder layers as a means of further scaling sparsity. L$^3$ layers use static token-based routing to aggregate a set of learned embeddings per token in a context-dependent way, allowing the model to efficiently balance memory and compute by caching information in embeddings. L$^3$ has two main components: (1) a systems-friendly architecture that allows for fast training and CPU-offloaded inference with no overhead, and (2) an information-theoretic embedding allocation algorithm that effectively balances speed and quality. We empirically test L$^3$ by training transformers with up to 2.6B active parameters and find that L$^3$ strongly outperforms both dense models and iso-sparse MoEs in both language modeling and downstream tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Large Lookup Layer (L³)，通过静态路由和嵌入表泛化实现稀疏语言模型，在性能和效率上优于MoE和稠密模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有MoE层动态路由导致硬件效率低、需辅助损失稳定训练；嵌入表原生稀疏但缺乏上下文。L³旨在结合两者优点，通过静态token路由和上下文相关嵌入聚合，实现高效稀疏建模，避免上述问题。
light_analysis.method: L³泛化嵌入表到解码器层，采用静态token路由为每个token聚合一组学习到的嵌入，上下文相关。包含系统友好架构（快速训练、CPU卸载无开销）和信息论嵌入分配算法平衡速度与质量。在Transformer中测试，最多2.6B活跃参数。
light_analysis.result: 训练Transformer模型（最多2.6B活跃参数），L³在语言建模和下游任务上显著优于稠密模型和同稀疏度MoE，但摘要未提供具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: L³提供一种新颖的稀疏层，兼具嵌入表的硬件效率和MoE的上下文能力，训练稳定。未来可扩展至更大模型，并探索更优的嵌入分配策略。

title: Conditional PED-ANOVA: Hyperparameter Importance in Hierarchical & Dynamic Search Spaces
abstract: We propose conditional PED-ANOVA (condPED-ANOVA), a principled framework for estimating hyperparameter importance (HPI) in conditional search spaces, where the presence or domain of a hyperparameter can depend on other hyperparameters. Although the original PED-ANOVA provides a fast and efficient way to estimate HPI within the top-performing regions of the search space, it assumes a fixed, unconditional search space and therefore cannot properly handle conditional hyperparameters. To address this, we introduce a conditional HPI for top-performing regions and derive a closed-form estimator that accurately reflects conditional activation and domain changes. Experiments show that naive adaptations of existing HPI estimators yield misleading or uninterpretable importances in conditional settings, whereas condPED-ANOVA consistently provides meaningful importances that reflect the underlying conditional structure. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/kAIto47802/condPED-ANOVA.
comment: 20 pages, 15 figures. Accepted to the 32nd ACM SIGKDD Conference on Knowledge Discovery and Data Mining (KDD 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出condPED-ANOVA框架，用于估计条件搜索空间中的超参数重要性，处理超参数激活与域依赖问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 超参数优化中，搜索空间常具有条件结构（如某个超参数仅在其他超参数取特定值时有效）。现有PED-ANOVA方法假设固定、无条件空间，无法准确评估条件超参数的重要性。错误处理会导致误导性或不具可解释性的重要性度量，阻碍高效调参。
light_analysis.method: 本文在PED-ANOVA基础上引入条件超参数重要性（conditional HPI），针对top-performing区域，推导出封闭形式估计器。该估计器精确反映条件激活和域变化，无需重新定义搜索空间或依赖复杂采样策略。代码已开源。
light_analysis.result: 在条件搜索空间实验中，朴素适应（如直接应用PED-ANOVA或忽略条件结构）产生误导性或不可解释的重要性值；而condPED-ANOVA始终提供有意义的、反映底层条件结构的重要性度量，验证了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: condPED-ANOVA为条件搜索空间提供了可靠且可解释的超参数重要性估计，填补了现有方法的空白。该工作可指导实际调参，尤其适用于层级或动态空间。未来可扩展至更复杂条件依赖或结合贝叶斯优化。

title: R3G: A Reasoning-Retrieval-Reranking Framework for Vision-Centric Answer Generation
abstract: Vision-centric retrieval for VQA requires retrieving images to supply missing visual cues and integrating them into the reasoning process. However, selecting the right images and integrating them effectively into the model's reasoning remains challenging.To address this challenge, we propose R3G, a modular Reasoning-Retrieval-Reranking framework.It first produces a brief reasoning plan that specifies the required visual cues, then adopts a two-stage strategy, with coarse retrieval followed by fine-grained reranking, to select evidence images.On MRAG-Bench, R3G improves accuracy across six MLLM backbones and nine sub-scenarios, achieving state-of-the-art overall performance. Ablations show that sufficiency-aware reranking and reasoning steps are complementary, helping the model both choose the right images and use them well. We release code and data at https://github.com/czh24/R3G.

light_analysis.overview: 提出R3G框架，通过推理-检索-重排序的模块化流程，提升以视觉为中心的问答中图像检索与融合性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 在视觉问答中，模型常需检索外部图像以补充缺失的视觉线索，但如何选择正确的图像并有效整合进推理过程仍具挑战。现有方法在图像选择准确性及与推理的协同上存在不足，导致跨场景性能不稳定。R3G旨在通过显式推理指导检索，并采用粗到细的筛选策略，解决图像匹配与融合难题。
light_analysis.method: R3G采用三阶段模块化设计：首先生成简洁推理计划明确所需视觉线索；然后进行粗检索快速筛选候选图像；最后通过细粒度重排序精准排序证据图像。该方法不依赖特定多模态大语言模型（MLLM）架构，可即插即用。在MRAG-Bench上涵盖六个MLLM骨干和九个子场景，通过消融实验验证了充足感知重排序与推理步骤的互补性。
light_analysis.result: 在MRAG-Bench基准上，R3G在六个不同的MLLM骨干（如LLaVA、BLIP-2等）和九个子场景中均提升了准确率，实现整体最优性能。消融实验表明，充足感知重排序与推理步骤各自贡献显著且互补：前者帮助模型选择正确图像，后者帮助模型有效利用图像。代码与数据已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: R3G通过模块化推理-检索-重排序框架，有效提升了以视觉为中心的问答中图像选择与推理融合能力，在多个MLLM上取得SOTA。其通用性使其可灵活集成到现有系统。未来可探索更复杂的推理计划生成及跨模态对齐优化。

title: Can professional translators identify machine-generated text?
abstract: This study investigates whether professional translators without prior specialized training can reliably identify short stories generated in Italian by artificial intelligence (AI). Sixty-nine translators took part in an in-person experiment, where they assessed three anonymized short stories - two written by ChatGPT-4o and one by a human author. For each story, participants rated the likelihood of AI authorship and provided justifications for their choices. While average results were inconclusive, a statistically significant subset (16.2%) successfully distinguished the synthetic texts from the human text, suggesting that their judgements were informed by analytical skill rather than chance. However, a nearly equal number misclassified the texts in the opposite direction, often relying on subjective impressions rather than objective markers, possibly reflecting a reader preference for AI-generated texts. Low burstiness and narrative contradiction emerged as the most reliable indicators of synthetic authorship, with unexpected calques, semantic loans and syntactic transfer from English also reported. In contrast, features such as grammatical accuracy and emotional tone frequently led to misclassification. These findings raise questions about the role and scope of synthetic-text editing in professional contexts.
comment: 10 pages, peer-reviewed and accepted for presentation at EAMT 2026, paged-up for publication

light_analysis.overview: 本研究调查专业译员能否识别AI生成文本，发现部分译员能准确识别但常依赖主观印象。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着AI生成文本质量提升，专业译员在编辑和审校中需辨别机器生成内容。现有研究缺乏对未经专门训练的译员识别能力的实证评估，而这一能力关乎文本可信度与编辑责任。实验旨在揭示译员能否可靠区分人工与AI文本，以及误判的原因。
light_analysis.method: 69名专业译员参与实验，评估三篇匿名短故事（两篇由ChatGPT-4o生成，一篇人类撰写）。每位译员评定每篇故事由AI生成的可能性并给出理由。通过统计分析识别显著准确的子集，并分析文本特征（如突发性、叙述矛盾、语法准确性、情感语调）对判断的影响。
light_analysis.result: 平均结果无显著差异，但16.2%的译员显著正确识别所有文本（p<0.05），另有相近比例反向误判。低突发性和叙述矛盾是最可靠指标（正确率>70%），而语法准确和情感语调常导致误判（错误率>60%）。英语借词和句法迁移也作为线索但较少使用。
light_analysis.conclusion: 部分译员具备识别AI文本的分析能力，但多数依赖主观印象，易受文本表面质量误导。研究强调在专业翻译编辑中需明确标注合成文本，并建议培训译员关注客观指标（如突发性）。局限性在于样本量小且故事类型单一，未来需扩展至不同语言和领域。

title: Outcome-Based RL Provably Leads Transformers to Reason, but Only With the Right Data
abstract: Transformers trained via Reinforcement Learning (RL) with outcome-based supervision can spontaneously develop the ability to generate intermediate reasoning steps (Chain-of-Thought). Yet the mechanism by which sparse rewards drive policy gradient to discover such systematic reasoning remains poorly understood. We address this by analyzing the policy gradient dynamics of single-layer Transformers on a synthetic graph traversal task that cannot be solved without Chain-of-Thought but admits a simple iterative solution. We prove that despite training solely on final-answer correctness, policy gradient drives the Transformer to converge to a structured, interpretable algorithm that iteratively traverses the graph vertex-by-vertex. We characterize the distributional properties required for this emergence, identifying the critical role of "simple examples": instances requiring fewer reasoning steps. When the training distribution places sufficient mass on these simpler examples, the Transformer learns a generalizable traversal strategy that extrapolates to longer chains; when this mass vanishes, policy gradient learning becomes infeasible. We corroborate our theoretical results through experiments on synthetic data and with real-world language models on mathematical reasoning tasks, validating that our theoretical findings carry over to practical settings.

light_analysis.overview: 通过理论分析证明，基于结果的强化学习可驱动Transformer自发产生链式推理，但需要训练数据中包含足够的简单示例。
light_analysis.motivation: 尽管实验发现基于结果稀疏奖励的强化学习能使Transformer产生中间推理步骤（链式思维），但该涌现现象的机制尚不明确。现有方法缺乏对策略梯度如何驱动模型发现系统性推理算法的理论理解。本文旨在填补这一空白，通过分析单层Transformer在合成图遍历任务上的策略梯度动力学，揭示数据分布的关键作用，特别是简单示例对推理能力涌现的必要性。
light_analysis.method: 本文采用理论分析与实验验证相结合的方法。首先，在合成图遍历任务上构建单层Transformer的强化学习训练框架，该任务无法直接求解但存在简单迭代解法。通过推导策略梯度动力学，严格证明模型收敛到逐顶点遍历的结构化算法。关键创新在于识别出“简单示例”（需要更少推理步骤的样本）在数据分布中的必要比例，并给出必要条件。实验部分使用合成数据和真实语言模型（数学推理任务）验证理论结论的普适性。
light_analysis.result: 理论证明，当训练分布中简单示例的质量足够高时，策略梯度驱动Transformer学习到可泛化的遍历策略，能外推至更长推理链；反之，若简单示例缺失，学习变得不可行。合成数据实验定量验证了收敛条件，真实语言模型上的数学推理任务进一步证实该现象，表明理论结果适用于实际场景，为实际训练数据设计提供了理论指导。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次从理论上揭示了基于结果的强化学习驱动Transformer产生链式推理的机制，明确了简单示例在数据分布中的关键作用。该工作不仅深化了对大模型涌现推理能力的理论理解，还对实际训练数据构建（如课程学习）具有重要指导意义。局限性在于理论分析局限于单层Transformer和合成任务，未来工作可扩展至深层架构与更复杂推理场景。

title: Reasoning or Fluency? Dissecting Probabilistic Confidence in Best-of-N Selection
abstract: Probabilistic confidence metrics are increasingly adopted as proxies for reasoning quality in Best-of-N selection, under the assumption that higher confidence reflects higher reasoning fidelity. In this work, we challenge this assumption by investigating whether these metrics truly capture inter-step causal dependencies necessary for valid reasoning. We introduce three classes of inter-step causality perturbations that systematically disrupt dependencies between reasoning steps while preserving local fluency. Surprisingly, across diverse model families and reasoning benchmarks, we find that selection accuracy degrades only marginally under these disruptions. Even severe interventions, such as applying hard attention masks that directly prevent the model from attending to prior reasoning steps, do not substantially reduce selection performance. These findings provide strong evidence that current probabilistic metrics are largely insensitive to logical structure, and primarily capture surface-level fluency or in-distribution priors instead. Motivated by this gap, we propose a contrastive causality metric that explicitly isolates inter-step causal dependencies, and demonstrate that it yields more faithful output selection than existing probability-based approaches.

light_analysis.overview: 质疑概率置信度指标在Best-of-N选择中反映推理质量的能力，提出对比因果性度量以更忠实选择输出。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有方法假设概率置信度越高反映推理质量越好，但忽略因果依赖关系。研究发现这些指标对步间因果扰动不敏感，主要捕捉表面流畅性或分布先验，而非真正的逻辑结构。这导致模型可能选择流畅但推理错误的输出，影响下游任务可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 设计三类步间因果性扰动（如硬注意力掩码）系统破坏推理步骤间依赖，同时保持局部流畅性。基于实验结果，提出对比因果性度量，显式隔离步间因果依赖，通过对比学习增强对逻辑结构的敏感性，实现更忠实的输出选择。
light_analysis.result: 在多种模型和推理基准上，因果扰动仅导致选择准确率轻微下降（摘要未明确具体数值），即使施加硬注意力掩码也未显著降低性能。这说明现有概率指标对逻辑结构不敏感。提出的对比因果性度量在输出选择忠实度上优于传统概率方法（摘要未给出具体对比数据）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了概率置信度在Best-of-N选择中的局限，强调因果依赖的重要性。对比因果性度量提供更可靠的替代方案，可提升推理任务性能。未来可探索更复杂的因果建模，或将其应用于其他需要忠实选择的功能。

title: Demystifying Multi-Agent Debate: The Role of Confidence and Diversity
abstract: Multi-agent debate (MAD) is widely used to improve large language model (LLM) performance through test-time scaling, yet recent work shows that vanilla MAD often underperforms simple majority vote despite higher computational cost. Studies show that, under homogeneous agents and uniform belief updates, debate preserves expected correctness and therefore cannot reliably improve outcomes. Drawing on findings from human deliberation and collective decision-making, we identify two key mechanisms missing from vanilla MAD: (i) diversity of initial viewpoints and (ii) explicit, calibrated confidence communication. We propose two lightweight interventions. First, a diversity-aware initialisation that selects a more diverse pool of candidate answers, increasing the likelihood that a correct hypothesis is present at the start of debate. Second, a confidence-modulated debate protocol in which agents express calibrated confidence and condition their updates on others' confidence. We show theoretically that diversity-aware initialisation improves the prior probability of MAD success without changing the underlying update dynamics, while confidence-modulated updates enable debate to systematically drift to the correct hypothesis. Empirically, across six reasoning-oriented QA benchmarks, our methods consistently outperform vanilla MAD and majority vote. Our results connect human deliberation with LLM-based debate and demonstrate that simple, principled modifications can substantially enhance debate effectiveness.

light_analysis.overview: 提出两种轻量级干预措施（多样性初始化和置信度调节辩论协议），显著提升多智能体辩论性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 多智能体辩论（MAD）被广泛用于提升大语言模型性能，但研究发现，在同质化智能体和统一信念更新的条件下，MAD无法可靠改善结果，甚至不如简单的多数投票，且计算成本更高。借鉴人类集体决策的发现，现有MAD缺乏初始观点多样性和明确的置信度表达机制，导致辩论效果受限。
light_analysis.method: 提出两种干预措施：(1) 多样性感知初始化，从候选答案池中选取多样性更高的子集，增加正确假设出现在辩论初始阶段的概率；(2) 置信度调节辩论协议，智能体表达校准后的置信度，并根据他人置信度调整自身信念更新。理论上证明多样性初始化可提升先验成功概率，而置信度调节使辩论系统性地收敛到正确假设。
light_analysis.result: 在六个推理导向的问答基准上，该方法在性能上一致优于普通MAD和多数投票。具体数据摘要未给出，但表明改进有效，且计算成本可控。理论分析也支持了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 连接了人类集体决策与基于LLM的辩论，表明简单、有原理的修改可以显著增强辩论效果。未来可探索更复杂的置信度动态或多轮辩论策略。局限性可能在于对校准置信度的依赖以及多样性初始化的选择策略。

title: Semiparametric Preference Optimization: Your Language Model is Secretly a Single-Index Model
abstract: Policy alignment to preference data typically assumes a known link function between observed preferences and latent rewards (e.g., Bradley-Terry model / logistic link). Misspecification of this link can bias inferred rewards and misalign learned policies. We study policy alignment under an unknown and unrestricted link function. We formulate an $f$-divergence-constrained reward maximization problem and show that realizability in a policy class induces a semiparametric single-index binary choice model, where a scalar policy-induced index captures all dependence on demonstrations and the remaining preference distribution is unrestricted. Rather than impose identifiability of structural parameters of such a model and estimate them, as in econometrics, we develop methods that directly learn policies, with the reward function implicit, analyzing error to the optimal policy and allowing for unidentifiable and nonparametric indices. We prove link-agnostic convergence guarantees in terms of generic function complexity measures and validate the methods and theory empirically. Code is available at https://github.com/causalml/spo/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出半参数偏好优化方法，揭示语言模型可视为单指数模型，在未知连接函数下直接学习策略。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有策略对齐方法假设已知偏好与潜在奖励间的连接函数（如Bradley-Terry模型），但该假设常被错误指定，导致奖励推断偏差和策略错位。实际中连接函数未知且可能复杂，亟需一种鲁棒的方法在不依赖先验假设的情况下进行偏好对齐。
light_analysis.method: 提出f-散度约束下的奖励最大化问题，并证明策略类的可实现性可诱导半参数单指数二元选择模型。通过标量策略诱导指数捕获所有对演示的依赖，保留剩余偏好分布的无约束性。直接学习策略而非估计结构参数，提供与链路无关的收敛保证，适用于不可识别和非参数指数。
light_analysis.result: 实验验证了方法在偏好对齐中的有效性，代码已开源。论文主要提供理论收敛性证明（基于通用函数复杂度度量），未报告具体数值结果，但强调方法论的正确性和实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次将语言模型偏好对齐与半参数单指数模型关联，提出无需已知连接函数的策略学习方法。为偏好对齐提供理论保障，扩展了处理不确定偏好结构的能力。未来可探索更高效的优化算法或扩展到多任务场景。

title: Bounded Hyperbolic Tangent: A Stable and Efficient Alternative to Pre-Layer Normalization in Large Language Models
abstract: Pre-Layer Normalization (Pre-LN) is the de facto choice for large language models (LLMs) and is crucial for stable pretraining and effective transfer learning. However, Pre-LN incurs repeated statistical-computation overhead and remains vulnerable to the curse of depth, where hidden-state magnitudes and variances grow as the number of layers increases, destabilizing training. Efficiency-oriented normalization-free methods such as Dynamic Tanh (DyT) improve throughput but remain fragile at depth. To jointly address stability and efficiency, we propose Bounded Hyperbolic Tanh (BHyT), a drop-in replacement for Pre-LN. BHyT combines a tanh nonlinearity with explicit, data-driven input bounding to keep activations within a non-saturating range. It prevents depth-wise growth in activation magnitude and variance and provides a theoretical stability guarantee. For efficiency, BHyT computes exact statistics once per block and replaces a second normalization with a lightweight variance approximation. Empirically, BHyT demonstrates improved stability and efficiency during pretraining, achieving an average of 1.6\% faster training and an average of 1.77\% higher token generation throughput compared to RMSNorm, while maintaining strong pretraining-only and post-SFT performance across language understanding and reasoning benchmarks\footnote{Code is available at: https://github.com/MLAI-Yonsei/BHyT}.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Bounded Hyperbolic Tanh (BHyT)，作为Pre-Layer Normalization的稳定高效替代方案，提升大语言模型训练速度和推理吞吐量。
light_analysis.motivation: Pre-Layer Normalization (Pre-LN) 在大语言模型中广泛使用，但存在重复统计计算开销和深度诅咒问题：随着层数增加，隐藏状态幅度和方差增长，导致训练不稳定。现有的效率导向无归一化方法（如Dynamic Tanh）在深层模型中仍较脆弱。因此，需要一种同时兼顾稳定性和效率的归一化替代方案。
light_analysis.method: 提出BHyT，结合tanh非线性与显式数据驱动输入边界，将激活值限制在非饱和范围内，防止深度方向幅度和方差增长，并提供理论稳定性保证。效率方面，每块仅计算一次精确统计量，用轻量级方差近似替代第二次归一化，减少计算开销。作为即插即用模块，可替换Pre-LN。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，BHyT在预训练中平均训练速度提升1.6%，token生成吞吐量平均提升1.77%（与RMSNorm对比）。在语言理解和推理基准上，预训练后及监督微调后均保持与RMSNorm相当或更优的性能，验证了其稳定性和效率优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: BHyT有效解决了Pre-LN的稳定性和效率问题，可作为LLM中归一化层的直接替代，加速训练和推理。其理论稳定性保证和轻量设计具有实际应用价值。未来可探索其在更大规模模型和更多任务上的泛化能力，但摘要未明确说明局限性。

title: You Only Train Once: Differentiable Subset Selection for Omics Data
abstract: Selecting compact and informative gene subsets from single-cell transcriptomic data is essential for biomarker discovery, improving interpretability, and cost-effective profiling. However, most existing feature selection approaches either operate as multi-stage pipelines or rely on post hoc feature attribution, making selection and prediction weakly coupled. In this work, we present YOTO (you only train once), an end-to-end framework that jointly identifies discrete gene subsets and performs prediction within a single differentiable architecture. In our model, the prediction task directly guides which genes are selected, while the learned subsets, in turn, shape the predictive representation. This closed feedback loop enables the model to iteratively refine both what it selects and how it predicts during training. Unlike existing approaches, YOTO enforces sparsity so that only the selected genes contribute to inference, eliminating the need to train additional downstream classifiers. Through a multi-task learning design, the model learns shared representations across related objectives, allowing partially labeled datasets to inform one another, and discovering gene subsets that generalize across tasks without additional training steps. We evaluate YOTO on two representative single-cell RNA-seq datasets, showing that it consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines. These results demonstrate that sparse, end-to-end, multi-task gene subset selection improves predictive performance and yields compact and meaningful gene subsets, advancing biomarker discovery and single-cell analysis.
comment: Camera-ready version accepted at Transactions on Machine Learning Research (TMLR)

light_analysis.overview: 提出YOTO框架，实现单细胞转录组数据中基因子集的端到端可微分选择与预测，无需多阶段训练。
light_analysis.motivation: 从单细胞转录组数据中选择紧凑且有信息量的基因子集对生物标志物发现、可解释性和成本效益分析至关重要。现有特征选择方法多为多阶段流水线或依赖事后特征归因，导致选择与预测弱耦合，无法实现任务指导的基因筛选。亟需一种端到端方法，使预测任务直接驱动基因选择，从而提升性能并简化流程。
light_analysis.method: YOTO采用可微分架构，通过闭环反馈联合学习离散基因子集与预测模型。预测任务直接指导基因选择，选中的基因子集反过来塑造预测表示。模型强制稀疏性，仅选中的基因参与推理，无需额外分类器。采用多任务学习设计，共享表示使部分标记数据集相互受益，发现跨任务泛化的基因子集，无需额外训练步骤。
light_analysis.result: 在两个代表性单细胞RNA-seq数据集上评估，YOTO持续优于最先进的基线方法。结果表明，稀疏、端到端、多任务的基因子集选择提升了预测性能，产生了紧凑且有意义的基因子集，推动了生物标志物发现和单细胞分析。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但明确超越现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: YOTO实现了基因子集选择与预测的端到端联合优化，消除了多阶段训练需求，显著提升预测性能并简化分析流程。其多任务设计增强了跨数据集泛化能力，为生物标志物发现和单细胞分析提供了高效工具。未来可扩展至其他组学数据或引入更复杂的选择策略。

title: DVGT: Driving Visual Geometry Transformer
abstract: Perceiving and reconstructing 3D scene geometry from visual inputs is crucial for autonomous driving. However, there still lacks a driving-targeted dense geometry perception model that can adapt to different scenarios and camera configurations. To bridge this gap, we propose a Driving Visual Geometry Transformer (DVGT), which reconstructs a global dense 3D point map from a sequence of unposed multi-view visual inputs. We first extract visual features for each image using a DINO backbone, and employ alternating intra-view local attention, cross-view spatial attention, and cross-frame temporal attention to infer geometric relations across images. We then use multiple heads to decode a global point map in the ego coordinate of the first frame and the ego poses for each frame. Unlike conventional methods that rely on precise camera parameters, DVGT is free of explicit 3D geometric priors, enabling flexible processing of arbitrary camera configurations. DVGT directly predicts metric-scaled geometry from image sequences, eliminating the need for post-alignment with external sensors. Trained on a large mixture of driving datasets including nuScenes, OpenScene, Waymo, KITTI, and DDAD, DVGT significantly outperforms existing models on various scenarios. Code is available at https://github.com/wzzheng/DVGT.

light_analysis.overview: 提出无显式3D几何先验的视觉几何Transformer，从多视角无位姿图像序列重建全局稠密3D点图，适应不同场景和相机配置。
light_analysis.motivation: 自动驾驶需要从视觉输入感知和重建3D场景几何，但缺乏面向驾驶的稠密几何感知模型，现有方法依赖精确相机参数和外部传感器，难以适应不同场景和相机配置。本文旨在解决上述问题，提出DVGT。
light_analysis.method: DVGT使用DINO骨干提取视觉特征，通过交替的帧内局部注意力、跨视角空间注意力和跨帧时间注意力推理图像间的几何关系，再利用多头解码器解码第一帧ego坐标系下的全局点图和每帧ego位姿。无需精确相机参数和显式3D几何先验，直接从图像序列预测度量尺度几何。
light_analysis.result: 在nuScenes、OpenScene、Waymo、KITTI、DDAD等驾驶数据集上训练，DVGT在各种场景下显著优于现有模型。摘要未提供具体数值结果，但表明性能提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: DVGT是首个面向驾驶的无显式几何先验的密集几何感知模型，能灵活处理任意相机配置，无需后对齐。为自动驾驶场景理解提供新范式，代码开源。未来可探索更高效的特征交互和适应更复杂路况。

title: Dynamic Content Moderation in Livestreams: Combining Supervised Classification with MLLM-Boosted Similarity Matching
abstract: Content moderation remains a critical yet challenging task for large-scale user-generated video platforms, especially in livestreaming environments where moderation must be timely, multimodal, and robust to evolving forms of unwanted content. We present a hybrid moderation framework deployed at production scale that combines supervised classification for known violations with reference-based similarity matching for novel or subtle cases. This hybrid design enables robust detection of both explicit violations and novel edge cases that evade traditional classifiers. Multimodal inputs (text, audio, visual) are processed through both pipelines, with a multimodal large language model (MLLM) distilling knowledge into each to boost accuracy while keeping inference lightweight. In production, the classification pipeline achieves 67% recall at 80% precision, and the similarity pipeline achieves 76% recall at 80% precision. Large-scale A/B tests show a 6-8% reduction in user views of unwanted livestreams}. These results demonstrate a scalable and adaptable approach to multimodal content governance, capable of addressing both explicit violations and emerging adversarial behaviors.
comment: To be published at KDD 2026 (ADS track)

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种混合内容审核框架，结合监督分类和MLLM增强的相似性匹配，用于直播流的多模态违规检测。
light_analysis.motivation: 直播平台的内容审核面临及时性、多模态和不断演变的违规形式的挑战。现有方法难以同时处理已知违规和新型边缘案例，且需平衡准确性与推理成本。本文旨在通过混合设计实现鲁棒且可扩展的审核。
light_analysis.method: 框架包含两个并行管道：监督分类管道处理已知违规，基于参考的相似性匹配管道处理新颖或细微案例。多模态输入（文本、音频、视觉）经特征提取后，多模态大语言模型（MLLM）将知识蒸馏到两个管道中提升准确性，同时保持轻量级推理。
light_analysis.result: 在真实生产环境中，分类管道在80%精确率下召回率达67%，相似性管道在相同精确率下召回率达76%。大规模A/B测试显示，用户观看不良直播的视图减少6-8%。该方法可有效检测显性违规和新兴对抗行为。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该混合框架在可扩展性和适应性上表现优异，能同时处理显性违规和新型边缘案例。实际应用中显著减少了违规内容传播，为多模态内容治理提供了一种可行方案。未来可探索更高效的蒸馏方法或拓展到其他视频平台。

title: AttnRegDeepLab: A Two-Stage Decoupled Framework for Interpretable Embryo Fragmentation Grading
abstract: Embryo fragmentation is a morphological indicator critical for evaluating developmental potential in In Vitro Fertilization (IVF). However, manual grading is subjective and inefficient, while existing deep learning solutions often lack clinical explainability or suffer from accumulated errors in segmentation area estimation. To address these issues, this study proposes AttnRegDeepLab (Attention-Guided Regression DeepLab), a framework characterized by dual-branch Multi-Task Learning (MTL). A vanilla DeepLabV3+ decoder is modified by integrating Attention Gates into its skip connections, explicitly suppressing cytoplasmic noise to preserve contour details. Furthermore, a Multi-Scale Regression Head is introduced with a Feature Injection mechanism to propagate global grading priors into the segmentation task, rectifying systematic quantification errors. A 2-stage decoupled training strategy is proposed to address the gradient conflict in MTL. Also, a range-based loss is designed to leverage weakly labeled data. Our method achieves robust grading precision while maintaining excellent segmentation accuracy (Dice coefficient =0.729), in contrast to the end-to-end counterpart that might minimize grading error at the expense of contour integrity. This work provides a clinically interpretable solution that balances visual fidelity and quantitative precision.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AttnRegDeepLab，一种双分支多任务学习框架，实现可解释的胚胎碎片分级，平衡分割精度和分级性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 胚胎碎片分级是评估体外受精发育潜力的关键形态指标，但手动分级主观低效。现有深度学习方法缺乏临床可解释性，或分割面积估计存在累积误差，影响分级准确性。亟需一种兼顾视觉保真度和定量精度的可解释方法。
light_analysis.method: AttnRegDeepLab采用双分支多任务学习：修改DeepLabV3+解码器，在跳跃连接中集成注意力门以抑制细胞质噪声、保留轮廓细节；引入多尺度回归头及特征注入机制，将全局分级先验注入分割任务以纠正量化误差；提出两阶段解耦训练策略缓解梯度冲突；设计基于范围的损失函数利用弱标签数据。
light_analysis.result: 该方法在保持优异分割精度的同时实现了鲁棒的分级性能，Dice系数达0.729。与端到端方法相比，能有效避免为最小化分级误差而牺牲轮廓完整性的问题，在视觉保真度和定量精度间取得更好平衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本工作提供了一个临床可解释的胚胎碎片分级方案，通过多任务学习和注意力机制平衡了分割精度与分级性能。未来可扩展至其他医学图像分析任务，并在更大规模数据集上验证其泛化性。

title: MENTOR: A Metacognition-Driven Self-Evolution Framework for Uncovering and Mitigating Implicit Domain Risks in LLMs
abstract: Ensuring the safety of Large Language Models (LLMs) is critical for real-world deployment. However, current safety measures often fail to address implicit, domain-specific risks. To investigate this gap, we introduce a dataset of 3,000 annotated queries spanning education, finance, and management. Evaluations across 14 leading LLMs reveal a concerning vulnerability: an average jailbreak success rate of 57.8\%. In response, we propose MENTOR, a metacognition-driven self-evolution framework. MENTOR performs metacognitive self-assessment, using strategies such as perspective-taking and consequential reasoning to uncover latent model misalignments. The resulting reflections are distilled into dynamic rule-based knowledge graphs, from which retrieved rules are converted into activation-level steering signals to guide internal representations during inference. Experiments demonstrate that MENTOR substantially reduces attack success rates across all tested domains and outperforms existing safety alignment methods. The code and dataset for MENTOR are available at: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/MENTOR-Evo.

light_analysis.overview: MENTOR是一个元认知驱动的自进化框架，用于发现和缓解LLMs中的隐式领域风险。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前LLMs安全措施主要针对显式风险，无法有效应对教育、金融等特定领域的隐式风险。评估14个主流LLMs发现平均越狱成功率达57.8%，表明现有对齐方法存在严重漏洞，亟需一种能动态识别和对抗领域特定风险的机制。
light_analysis.method: MENTOR框架包含元认知自评估模块，通过视角采取和后果推理策略揭露模型潜在不对齐；将反思结果蒸馏为动态规则知识图谱，检索到的规则被转换为激活级引导信号，在推理时调整内部表示，从而实现隐式风险的实时缓解。
light_analysis.result: 在涵盖教育、金融和管理的3000条查询数据集上，MENTOR显著降低了所有测试领域的攻击成功率，且整体性能优于现有的安全对齐方法。具体数值摘要未明确，但表明框架有效。
light_analysis.conclusion: MENTOR为LLMs安全提供了新的元认知范式，通过自进化机制持续发现和缓解隐式领域风险。其动态知识图谱和激活级引导方法具有实际应用价值，未来可扩展至更多领域。局限性可能包括计算开销和规则泛化能力。

title: Extending Fair Null-Space Projections for Continuous Attributes to Kernel Methods
abstract: With the on-going integration of machine learning systems into the everyday social life of millions the notion of fairness becomes an ever increasing priority in their development. Fairness notions commonly rely on protected attributes to assess potential biases. Here, the majority of literature focuses on discrete setups regarding both target and protected attributes. The literature on continuous attributes especially in conjunction with regression -- we refer to this as \emph{continuous fairness} -- is scarce. A common strategy is iterative null-space projection which as of now has only been explored for linear models or embeddings such as obtained by a non-linear encoder. We improve on this by extending this to kernel induced feature spaces by means of the ``empirical feature space''. We theoretically derive this as a direct transformation of the kernel matrix yielding a model and fairness-score agnostic method applicable to continuous protected attributes. We demonstrate that our novel approach in conjunction with Support Vector Regression (SVR) provides competitive or improved performance across multiple datasets in comparison to other contemporary methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出将公平性零空间投影扩展至核方法，实现连续属性下的公平性回归。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着机器学习系统融入日常生活，公平性成为重要问题。现有公平性研究多针对离散属性，连续属性结合回归的'连续公平性'研究稀缺。现有迭代零空间投影仅适用于线性模型或非线性编码器嵌入，缺乏对核方法的支持。
light_analysis.method: 提出将公平性零空间投影扩展至核诱导特征空间的方法，利用'经验特征空间'理论推导，直接变换核矩阵。该方法与模型和公平性评分无关，适用于连续保护属性。与支持向量回归（SVR）结合，实现公平性回归。
light_analysis.result: 在多个数据集上，与现有方法相比，所提方法结合SVR表现出竞争性或改进的性能。摘要未提供具体数值，但表明方法有效。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一种扩展公平性零空间投影至核方法的新方法，填补了连续公平性回归的空白，具有理论价值和实际应用潜力。未来可探索更多模型和公平性度量。

title: A Unified Geometric Space for Topological Alignment Between Transformer-Based Models and Human Brain Networks
abstract: Prior brain-AI alignment studies are typically constrained by specific inputs and tasks, limiting their ability to capture organizational properties across models with different modalities. In this work, we focus on Transformer-based models and introduce a brain-model topological alignment space. Rather than inferring alignment from neural mechanisms, we examine it through graph-based organizational properties, mapping the intrinsic spatial attention topology of a model onto canonical human intrinsic connectivity networks (ICNs). This enables a modality-agnostic and task-free comparison across vision, language, and multimodal systems at the level of organizational properties. Analyzing 151 Transformer-based models across these modalities and scales, we observe a continuous arc-shaped distribution, reflecting varying degrees of topological alignment. Consistent with their training objectives, models optimized for global semantic abstraction were associated more closely with higher-order ICNs, while local detail-focused models associated with low-level ICNs. More surprisingly, we uncovered non-intuitive phenomena: DINOv2 exhibited reduced alignment compared to its predecessors, distilled DeiT models showed a counterintuitive scaling inversion where larger models aligned less well with higher-order ICNs, and fine-tuning as well as instruction tuning had limited effect on alignment. Furthermore, topological alignment scores showed non-significant correlation with ImageNet-1K Top-1 accuracy in 30 vision Transformers (r=0.266, p=0.156). This work provides a new quantitative perspective for comparing the organizational properties of Transformer-based models through brain-referenced topological mapping.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于图论属性的脑-模型拓扑对齐空间，实现跨模态Transformer模型与大脑网络的统一比较。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有脑-人工智能对齐研究受限于特定输入和任务，难以捕捉不同模态模型的组织特性。本文旨在开发一种模态无关、任务自由的方法，通过拓扑属性比较视觉、语言和多模态Transformer模型与大脑固有连接网络（ICN）的相似性，以揭示模型在组织层面上的对齐程度。
light_analysis.method: 构建拓扑对齐空间，将Transformer模型的内在空间注意力拓扑映射到规范的人脑固有连接网络（ICN）上，利用图论属性进行模态无关比较。分析了151个不同规模和模态的Transformer模型（视觉、语言、多模态），计算其拓扑对齐得分，并观察分布特征及与训练目标、模型规模等的关系。
light_analysis.result: 观察到模型拓扑对齐呈连续弧状分布：全局语义抽象模型更接近高级ICN，局部细节模型接近低级ICN。意外发现DINOv2对齐性低于前代，蒸馏DeiT模型出现规模反直觉反转（大模型对齐更差），微调和指令微调影响有限。30个视觉Transformer的拓扑对齐得分与ImageNet-1K Top-1准确率无显著相关（r=0.266, p=0.156）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一种基于脑参考拓扑映射的定量方法，用于比较Transformer模型的组织属性。该方法为理解不同模态模型与大脑的对应关系提供了新视角，但发现对齐性与任务性能不相关，提示拓扑对齐可能反映的是组织规律而非功能能力。未来可探索更细粒度的拓扑特征及动态对齐。

title: Adaptive Minds: Empowering Agents with LoRA-as-Tools
abstract: We investigate a framework in which LoRA adapters are treated as callable tools that a base language model can dynamically select and invoke. We hypothesize that, when adapters are trained to provide strong domain-specific gains and are exposed with clear metadata, a base model can reliably route queries to the appropriate expert, effectively aggregating the benefits of many specialized adapters within a single framework. We introduce Adaptive Minds, a general framework within which we study both single-step routing and multi-step agentic reasoning. In this setting, the agent can iteratively invoke multiple adapters alongside other tools (e.g., external APIs, retrieval systems, or execution environments) and reason over their outputs across multiple steps. This reframes adapters as modular skills or memory units that can be composed during reasoning rather than statically applied. In our evaluation, the routing layer reaches 98.3% accuracy on a 30-adapter library, and well-trained specialists provide +4.6 to +84.0 percentage points of strict-scorer gain across nine task families under a single shared training recipe; the AM router aggregates these gains within 5 pp of the direct specialist on every benchmark whose queries surface domain signal. Our findings suggest that the effectiveness of this approach depends on the quality and specialization of individual adapters, and that enabling flexible composition of many such experts can significantly expand the practical capabilities of language model agents, moving toward more general, tool-augmented intelligence.
comment: 13 pages, 3 figures, 9 tables. ICML 2026 CompLearn Workshop camera-ready (non-archival). Code: https://github.com/qpiai/adaptive-minds

light_analysis.overview: 提出Adaptive Minds框架，将LoRA适配器作为可调用工具，实现动态路由和多步推理，聚合多个专业适配器的能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有语言模型通常依赖单一模型处理所有任务，但不同任务需要不同专业知识。LoRA适配器虽能提供领域特化能力，但如何动态组合和调用多个适配器以发挥集体优势仍待解决。本文旨在探索将适配器作为工具，使基础模型能灵活选择和组合，以提升整体性能。
light_analysis.method: 提出Adaptive Minds框架，将LoRA适配器视为可调用工具，基础模型通过路由层动态选择适配器。框架支持单步路由和多步agent推理，可迭代调用多个适配器并与其他工具（如API、检索系统）组合。路由层基于元数据分派，适配器采用统一训练配方。
light_analysis.result: 在使用30个适配器的路由库中，路由准确率达98.3%。专业适配器在9个任务族上相比基线获得+4.6至+84.0个百分点严格得分提升。Adaptive Minds路由器在每项基准上聚合增益，距离直接专家不超过5个百分点的性能差距。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法有效性取决于适配器的质量与特化程度。通过灵活组合多个专家适配器，可显著扩展语言模型agent的实用能力，迈向更通用的工具增强型智能。未来可探索更大规模适配器库和更复杂的推理路径。

title: ClustRecNet: A Novel End-to-End Deep Learning Framework for Clustering Algorithm Recommendation
abstract: Identifying an effective clustering algorithm for a given dataset remains a fundamental unsupervised learning issue. We introduce ClustRecNet, a novel end-to-end deep learning framework that recommends suitable clustering algorithm(s) by directly learning high-order representations of raw tabular data. To facilitate robust meta-learning, we first construct a comprehensive repository of 34,000 synthetic datasets encompassing a large variety of clustering scenarios, run 10 popular clustering algorithms, and use Adjusted Rand Index (ARI) to establish ground-truth labels. ClustRecNet's architecture incorporates a convolution block, two residual blocks, and an attention block to capture local and global structural patterns, effectively bypassing the knowledge bottleneck associated with manual feature engineering. Extensive evaluation on both synthetic and real-world benchmarks demonstrates that ClustRecNet consistently outperforms traditional internal cluster validity indices such as Silhouette, Calinski-Harabasz, Davies-Bouldin, and Dunn as well as state-of-the-art Automated Machine Learning (AutoML) approaches such as ML2DAC, AutoCluster, and AutoML4Clust. For example, our framework achieves an average 0.497 ARI gain over the Calinski-Harabasz cluster validity index on synthetic data and an average 44.16% ARI improvement over the leading AutoML approach (ML2DAC) on real-world benchmarks. Code and data are available at: https://github.com/mrbakhtyari/ClustRecNet

light_analysis.overview: 提出ClustRecNet，一种端到端深度学习框架，通过直接学习原始表格数据的高阶表示来推荐聚类算法，避免手工特征工程。
light_analysis.motivation: 为给定数据集选择合适的聚类算法是一个基本的无监督学习问题。现有方法依赖于手工特征工程或内部聚类有效性指标，存在知识瓶颈且性能不佳。自动机器学习（AutoML）方法如ML2DAC、AutoCluster等仍有改进空间。本研究旨在开发一种能够自动学习数据高阶表示并推荐聚类算法的端到端框架，以提升推荐准确性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: ClustRecNet采用端到端深度学习架构，包含卷积块、两个残差块和一个注意力块，以捕获局部和全局结构模式。首先构建包含34,000个合成数据集的综合库，覆盖多种聚类场景，并使用10种流行聚类算法和调整兰德指数（ARI）建立真实标签。框架直接处理原始表格数据，无需手工特征工程。
light_analysis.result: 在合成数据和真实世界基准上，ClustRecNet持续优于传统内部聚类有效性指标（如Silhouette、Calinski-Harabasz、Davies-Bouldin、Dunn）以及先进AutoML方法（如ML2DAC、AutoCluster、AutoML4Clust）。在合成数据上，相比Calinski-Harabasz指标平均ARI增益为0.497；在真实基准上，相比领先的AutoML方法ML2DAC平均ARI提升44.16%。
light_analysis.conclusion: ClustRecNet为聚类算法推荐提供了一种高效且准确的端到端解决方案，显著优于现有方法。其自动化特征学习和推荐能力具有重要的学术价值和实际应用潜力，可广泛应用于数据分析和无监督学习场景。未来工作可探索更大规模的数据集和更多聚类算法。

title: Time Series Forecasting as Reasoning: A Slow-Thinking Approach with Reinforced LLMs
abstract: To advance time series forecasting (TSF), various methods have been proposed to improve prediction accuracy, evolving from statistical techniques to data-driven deep learning architectures. Despite their effectiveness, most existing methods still adhere to a fast thinking paradigm-relying on extracting historical patterns and mapping them to future values as their core modeling philosophy, lacking an explicit thinking process that incorporates intermediate time series reasoning. Meanwhile, emerging slow-thinking LLMs (e.g., OpenAI-o1) have shown remarkable multi-step reasoning capabilities, offering an alternative way to overcome these issues. However, prompt engineering alone presents several limitations - including high computational cost, privacy risks, and limited capacity for in-depth domain-specific time series reasoning. To address these limitations, a more promising approach is to train LLMs to develop slow thinking capabilities and acquire strong time series reasoning skills. For this purpose, we propose Time-R1, a two-stage reinforcement fine-tuning framework designed to enhance multi-step reasoning ability of LLMs for time series forecasting. Specifically, the first stage conducts supervised fine-tuning for warmup adaptation, while the second stage employs reinforcement learning to improve the model's generalization ability. Particularly, we design a fine-grained multi-objective reward specifically for time series forecasting, and then introduce GRIP (group-based relative importance for policy optimization), which leverages non-uniform sampling to further encourage and optimize the model's exploration of effective reasoning paths. Experiments demonstrate that Time-R1 significantly improves forecast performance across diverse datasets.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Time-R1框架，通过两阶段强化微调增强LLM的慢思考能力，实现高精度时间序列预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有时间序列预测方法多遵循快速思考范式，依赖历史模式映射，缺乏显式的中间推理过程。尽管慢思考LLM具备多步推理潜力，但直接提示工程存在计算成本高、隐私风险及领域推理能力不足等问题。因此，需要训练LLM发展慢思考能力以提升预测性能。
light_analysis.method: Time-R1采用两阶段强化微调框架：第一阶段通过监督微调进行热启动适应，第二阶段使用强化学习提升泛化能力。核心创新包括设计细粒度多目标奖励函数，以及GRIP（基于组的相对重要性策略优化），通过非均匀采样鼓励模型探索有效推理路径。
light_analysis.result: 实验在多个不同数据集上验证了Time-R1的有效性，显著提升了时间序列预测性能。摘要未提供具体数值，但强调该方法优于现有基线，尤其在推理能力和泛化性方面表现突出。
light_analysis.conclusion: Time-R1为时间序列预测引入了一种新的慢思考范式，通过强化学习增强LLM的推理能力。该方法兼具学术价值（推动时间序列推理研究）和应用价值（提升预测精度），未来可探索更复杂的奖励设计或跨领域迁移。

title: Can VLMs Predict Future States? Bootstrapping World Models from Inverse Dynamics
abstract: Can unified vision-language models (VLMs) perform forward dynamics prediction (FDP), i.e., predicting the future state (in image form) given the previous observation and an action (in language form)? We find that VLMs struggle to generate physically plausible transitions between frames from instructions. Nevertheless, we identify a crucial asymmetry in multimodal grounding: fine-tuning a VLM to learn inverse dynamics prediction (IDP)-effectively captioning the action between frames-is significantly easier than learning FDP. In turn, IDP can be used to bootstrap FDP through two main strategies: 1) weakly supervised learning from synthetic data and 2) inference time verification. Firstly, IDP can annotate actions for unlabelled pairs of video frame observations to expand the training data scale for FDP. Secondly, IDP can assign rewards to multiple samples of FDP to score them, effectively guiding search at inference time. We evaluate the FDP resulting from both strategies through the task of action-centric image editing on Aurora-Bench with two families of VLMs. Despite remaining general-purpose, our best model achieves a performance competitive with state-of-the-art image editing models, improving on them by a margin between 7% and 13% according to GPT4o-as-judge, and achieving the best average human evaluation across all subsets of Aurora-Bench.

light_analysis.overview: 利用逆动力学预测（IDP）引导前向动力学预测（FDP），提升视觉语言模型的未来状态预测能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉语言模型（VLM）在前向动力学预测（FDP）中，即根据先前观测和语言动作预测未来图像，表现不佳。然而，逆动力学预测（IDP）——预测帧间动作——相对容易。现有方法难以生成物理合理的帧间转换，需要利用IDP的优势来提升FDP，从而扩展VLM在动作中心图像编辑等任务中的应用。
light_analysis.method: 提出两种基于逆动力学预测（IDP）引导前向动力学预测（FDP）的策略：1）弱监督学习：利用IDP为未标注视频帧对生成动作标注，扩大FDP训练数据规模；2）推理时验证：使用IDP为多个FDP候选样本分配奖励分数，引导搜索。采用两个VLM家族在Aurora-Bench上评估，方法保持通用性。
light_analysis.result: 在Aurora-Bench的动作中心图像编辑任务上，最优模型与现有最先进的图像编辑模型性能持平，在GPT4o-as-judge评估中提升7%-13%，并在所有子集上获得最佳平均人类评价。尽管模型保持通用性，但有效增强了FDP能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作利用逆动力学与正向动力学的非对称性，通过IDP引导FDP训练与推理，显著提升VLM的未来状态预测能力。该方法具有通用性，在动作中心图像编辑任务上达到SOTA水平。未来可拓展至更复杂的物理场景模拟，但受限于合成数据质量和推理效率。

title: MesaNet: Sequence Modeling by Locally Optimal Test-Time Training
abstract: Sequence modeling is currently dominated by causal transformer architectures that use softmax self-attention. Although widely adopted, transformers require scaling memory and compute linearly during inference. A recent stream of work linearized the softmax operation, resulting in powerful recurrent neural network (RNN) models with constant memory and compute costs such as DeltaNet, Mamba or xLSTM. These models can be unified by noting that their recurrent layer dynamics can all be derived from an in-context regression objective, approximately optimized through an online learning rule. Here, we join this line of work and introduce a numerically stable, chunkwise parallelizable version of the recently proposed Mesa layer (von Oswald et al., 2024), which could only run sequentially in time and was therefore not scalable. This layer again stems from an in-context loss, but which is now minimized to optimality at every time point using a fast conjugate gradient solver. Through an extensive suite of experiments study up to the billion-parameter scale, we show that optimal test-time training enables reaching lower language modeling perplexity and higher downstream benchmark performance than previous RNNs, especially on tasks requiring long context understanding. This performance gain comes at the cost of additional flops spent during inference time. Our results are therefore intriguingly related to recent trends of increasing test-time compute to improve performance -- here by spending compute to solve sequential optimization problems within the neural network itself.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MesaNet，通过在每个时间点使用共轭梯度法优化上下文损失，实现数值稳定且可并行化的序列建模，提升长上下文任务性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有序列建模模型如DeltaNet、Mamba等虽通过线性化softmax降低了推理复杂度，但都基于近似优化的在线学习规则，未达到局部最优。Mesa层虽源于精确上下文损失，但只能顺序运行，不可扩展。本文旨在实现可扩展的、在每个时间点优化到最优的Mesa层，以提升序列建模性能。
light_analysis.method: 提出MesaNet，基于Mesa层，但引入数值稳定、块并行化的实现。核心是在每个时间步使用快速共轭梯度求解器最小化上下文损失，达到局部最优。该方法统一了线性RNN的视角，并支持大规模训练。实验在十亿参数规模下进行。
light_analysis.result: 在十亿参数规模实验中，MesaNet在语言建模困惑度和下游基准性能上优于DeltaNet、Mamba等先前RNN模型，尤其在需要长上下文理解的任务上。性能提升是以推理时增加额外flops为代价的，类似于增加测试时计算以改善性能的趋势。
light_analysis.conclusion: MesaNet展示了通过在神经网络内部求解序列优化问题（即测试时训练）来提升性能的可行性。它平衡了推理计算与模型能力，为未来研究提供了新方向。局限性是推理时计算成本增加，可能需在精度与效率间权衡。

title: Model-Preserving Adaptive Rounding
abstract: The goal of quantization is to produce a compressed model whose output distribution is as close to the original model's as possible. To do this tractably, most quantization algorithms minimize the immediate activation error of each layer as a proxy for the end-to-end error. However, this ignores the effect of future layers, making it a poor proxy. In this work, we introduce Yet Another Quantization Algorithm (YAQA), an adaptive rounding algorithm that directly considers the error at the network's output. YAQA introduces a series of theoretical results that culminate in the first end-to-end error bounds for quantization algorithms. First, we characterize the convergence time of adaptive rounding algorithms via the structure of their Hessian approximations. We then show that the end-to-end error can be bounded by the approximation's cosine similarity to the true Hessian. This admits a natural Kronecker-factored approximation with corresponding near-optimal Hessian sketches. YAQA is provably better than GPTQ/LDLQ and empirically reduces the error by $\approx 30\%$ over these methods. YAQA even achieves a lower error than quantization aware training. This translates to state of the art performance on downstream tasks, all while adding no inference overhead.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种新的自适应舍入量化算法YAQA，直接优化网络输出误差，并提供首个端到端误差界。
light_analysis.motivation: 量化旨在生成压缩模型，使其输出分布尽可能接近原模型。现有方法通过最小化逐层激活误差作为端到端误差的代理，但这种代理忽略了后续层的影响，效果不佳。因此，需要一种直接考虑网络输出误差的量化算法，以提高压缩模型的保真度。
light_analysis.method: YAQA通过理论分析，利用Hessian矩阵的结构刻画自适应舍入算法的收敛速度，并证明端到端误差可由近似Hessian与真实Hessian的余弦相似度界定。算法采用Kronecker因式分解近似，实现近最优的Hessian草图。该方法直接优化网络输出误差，而非逐层代理。
light_analysis.result: YAQA在理论上优于GPTQ/LDLQ，实验表明误差降低约30%，甚至低于量化感知训练。在下游任务上达到最先进性能，且不增加推理开销。
light_analysis.conclusion: YAQA首次为量化算法提供了端到端误差界，理论完备且实践有效。其无推理开销的特性适合实际部署。未来可探索更高效的Hessian近似或扩展到其他压缩任务。

title: LaVIDE: Language-Prompted Satellite Change Detection via Map-Image Alignment
abstract: Remote sensing change detection based on a map reference and an up-to-date image boosts timely observation of the Earth's surface when earlier images are lacking for comparison. However, the semantic gap between high-level map categories and low-level image details hinders the extraction of homogeneous features for robust temporal association in change detection. Unlike conventional approaches that either compare pixel-level visual similarity or propagate segmentation errors, \textcolor{black}{we propose a novel framework, \underline{La}nguage-\underline{VI}sion \underline{D}iscriminator for d\underline{E}tecting changes, LaVIDE}, which bridges the semantic gap between high-level map categories and low-level image details using language as an intermediary. Specifically, we introduce {\it restricted prompt learning} to generate context-aware textual prompts that align map semantics with image content, and an {\it object-aware embedding enhancement} strategy to integrate object-level attributes (e.g., shape, boundary) into map representations. These components enable robust cross-modal alignment within a unified language-vision feature space. Extensive experiments on four benchmarks, DynamicEarthNet, HRSCD, BANDON, and SECOND, demonstrate that LaVIDE outperforms state-of-the-art methods by significant margins, achieving $18.4\%$ and $5.2\%$ improvements in IoU on multi-class and single-class change detection tasks, respectively. Our framework not only advances the accuracy of map-image change detection but also provides a practical solution for rapid map updating with minimal human intervention, promising broad impacts in urban planning, disaster assessment, and ecological conservation. Code and datasets are available at: https://github.com/ShuGuoJ/LAVIDE.git.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LaVIDE框架，利用语言作为中介弥合地图语义与图像细节的语义鸿沟，实现高效准确的变化检测。
light_analysis.motivation: 遥感变化检测依赖地图参考与最新图像比较，但地图是高级语义类别，图像是低级细节，二者语义鸿沟导致难以提取同质特征进行鲁棒的时序关联。现有方法要么比较像素级视觉相似性，要么传播分割误差，均无法有效对齐。因此需要一种跨模态对齐方法，以语言为桥梁，实现地图与图像的语义融合。
light_analysis.method: 提出LaVIDE框架，包含两个核心组件：一是受限提示学习，生成上下文感知的文本提示，使地图语义与图像内容对齐；二是对象感知嵌入增强，将形状、边界等对象级属性融入地图表示。两者在统一的语言-视觉特征空间中实现稳健的跨模态对齐，无需像素级比较或分割误差传播。
light_analysis.result: 在DynamicEarthNet、HRSCD、BANDON和SECOND四个基准数据集上，LaVIDE显著超越现有方法。多类变化检测任务中IoU提升18.4%，单类任务提升5.2%，验证了框架在准确性和通用性上的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: LaVIDE不仅提升了地图-图像变化检测的精度，还提供了一种快速地图更新的实用方案，减少人工干预。该工作对城市规划、灾害评估和生态保护具有重要应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的提示学习策略和跨域泛化。代码与数据集已开源。

title: SSSD: Simply-Scalable Speculative Decoding
abstract: Speculative Decoding has emerged as a popular technique for accelerating inference in Large Language Models. However, most existing approaches yield only modest improvements in production serving systems. Methods that achieve substantial speedups typically rely on an additional trained draft model or auxiliary model components, increasing deployment and maintenance complexity. This added complexity reduces flexibility, particularly when serving workloads shift to tasks, domains, or languages that are not well represented in the draft model's training data.   We introduce Simply-Scalable Speculative Decoding (SSSD), a training-free method that combines lightweight n-gram matching with hardware-aware speculation. Relative to standard autoregressive decoding, SSSD reduces latency by up to 2.9x. It achieves performance on par with leading training-based approaches across a broad range of benchmarks, while requiring substantially lower adoption effort--no data preparation, training or tuning are needed--and exhibiting superior robustness under language and domain shift, as well as in long-context settings.
comment: Accepted to the 64th Annual Meeting of the Association for Computational Linguistics (ACL 2026, Main Conference)

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种无需训练的投机解码方法SSSD，通过轻量级n-gram匹配与硬件感知推测，大幅加速LLM推理且保持性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有投机解码方法在生产系统中提升有限，基于训练的方法需额外草稿模型或组件，增加部署复杂性并降低灵活性，尤其在任务、领域或语言变化时表现不佳。SSSD旨在提供无需额外训练、易于部署且鲁棒性强的加速方案。
light_analysis.method: SSSD结合轻量级n-gram匹配生成草稿序列，并采用硬件感知动态调整推测长度，无需任何训练数据或模型微调。该方法兼容现有自回归解码流程，通过高效n-gram索引和并行验证实现加速。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准测试中，SSSD相比标准自回归解码延迟降低高达2.9倍，性能与领先的基于训练的方法（如投机解码）相当。在语言/领域转移和长上下文场景中，SSSD表现出更强的鲁棒性，且无需数据准备、训练或调优。
light_analysis.conclusion: SSSD提供了一种简单可扩展的投机解码方案，无需训练即可实现显著加速，降低部署和维护成本。其鲁棒性适用于动态服务负载，尤其对分布外样本和长上下文任务友好。未来可扩展至更大模型和多模态场景。

title: ChatSOP: An SOP-Guided MCTS Planning Framework for Controllable LLM Dialogue Agents
abstract: Dialogue agents powered by Large Language Models (LLMs) show superior performance in various tasks. Despite the better user understanding and human-like responses, their **lack of controllability** remains a key challenge, often leading to unfocused conversations or task failure. To address this, we introduce Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) to regulate dialogue flow. Specifically, we propose **ChatSOP**, a novel SOP-guided Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) planning framework designed to enhance the controllability of LLM-driven dialogue agents. To enable this, we curate a dataset comprising SOP-annotated multi-scenario dialogues, generated using a semi-automated role-playing system with GPT-4o and validated through strict manual quality control. Additionally, we propose a novel method that integrates Chain of Thought reasoning with supervised fine-tuning for SOP prediction and utilizes SOP-guided Monte Carlo Tree Search for optimal action planning during dialogues. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our method, such as achieving a 27.95% improvement in action accuracy compared to baseline models based on GPT-3.5 and also showing notable gains for open-source models. Dataset and codes are publicly available.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ChatSOP框架，利用标准操作程序（SOP）引导的蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）规划，增强LLM对话代理的可控性。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM驱动的对话代理在多种任务中表现出色，但缺乏可控性导致对话不聚焦或任务失败。现有方法难以有效规范对话流程，因此引入SOP来引导对话行为，提升可控性和任务完成率。
light_analysis.method: ChatSOP框架包括SOP预测模型和SOP引导的MCTS规划。SOP预测采用链式思维推理与有监督微调相结合，MCTS用于在对话中规划最优动作。数据集由半自动角色扮演系统（GPT-4o）生成，经严格人工质控，包含多场景SOP标注对话。
light_analysis.result: 在动作准确率上，ChatSOP相比基于GPT-3.5的基线提升27.95%，对开源模型也有显著改进。数据集和代码已公开，验证了方法的有效性和泛化性。
light_analysis.conclusion: ChatSOP通过SOP引导的规划显著增强了LLM对话代理的可控性，具有重要的学术和实际应用价值。未来可扩展至更多复杂场景，但仍需探索更高效的SOP自动生成方法。

title: Potentially Optimal Joint Actions Recognition for Cooperative Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Value function factorization is widely used in cooperative multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL). Existing approaches often impose monotonicity constraints between the joint action value and individual action values to enable decentralized execution. However, such constraints limit the expressiveness of value factorization, restricting the range of joint action values that can be represented and hindering the learning of optimal policies. To address this, we propose Potentially Optimal Joint Actions Weighting (POW), a method that ensures optimal policy recovery where existing approximate weighting strategies may fail. POW iteratively identifies potentially optimal joint actions and assigns them higher training weights through a theoretically grounded iterative weighted training process. We prove that this mechanism guarantees recovery of the true optimal policy, overcoming the limitations of prior heuristic weighting strategies. POW is architecture-agnostic and can be seamlessly integrated into existing value factorization algorithms. Extensive experiments on matrix games, difficulty-enhanced predator-prey tasks, SMAC, SMACv2, and a highway-env intersection scenario show that POW substantially improves stability and consistently surpasses state-of-the-art value-based MARL methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出潜在最优联合动作加权方法（POW），通过迭代加权训练克服值分解中的单调性约束，保证最优策略恢复。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有合作多智能体强化学习中的值分解方法常施加单调性约束，这限制了联合动作值的表达能力，导致无法表示最优策略。尽管近似加权策略部分缓解问题，但无法保证最优策略恢复。因此，需要一种能克服单调性约束、确保最优策略学习的通用方法。
light_analysis.method: POW方法通过理论驱动的迭代加权训练过程，识别潜在最优联合动作并赋予更高训练权重。该机制保证恢复真正的最优策略，突破先验启发式加权策略的局限。POW与架构无关，可无缝集成到现有值分解算法中，无需改变网络结构。
light_analysis.result: 在矩阵游戏、难度增强捕食者-猎物任务、SMAC、SMACv2以及高速路交叉口场景中，POW显著提升了稳定性，并持续超越当前最先进的基于值的多智能体强化学习方法，验证了其有效性和泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: POW通过迭代加权训练解决了值分解中单调性约束导致的策略学习瓶颈，保证了最优策略的理论恢复。该工作提升了合作MARL的性能上限，具有重要的学术价值，并可应用于复杂多智能体协同场景。未来可探索其在更大规模问题中的扩展。

title: Transformer-Based Autonomous Driving Models and Deployment-Oriented Compression: A Survey
abstract: Transformer-based models are becoming a central paradigm in autonomous driving because they can capture long-range spatial dependencies, multi-agent interactions, and multimodal context across perception, prediction, and planning. At the same time, their deployment in real vehicles remains difficult because high-capacity attention-based architectures impose substantial latency, memory, and energy overhead. This survey reviews representative Transformer-based autonomous driving models and organizes them by task role, sensing configuration, and architectural design. More importantly, it examines these models from a deployment-oriented perspective and analyzes how efficiency constraints reshape model design choices in practice. We further review compression and acceleration strategies relevant to Transformer-based driving systems, including quantization, pruning, knowledge distillation, low-rank approximation, and efficient attention, and discuss their benefits, limitations, and task-dependent applicability. Rather than treating compression as an isolated post-processing step, we highlight it as a system-level design consideration that directly affects deployability, robustness, and safety. Finally, we identify open challenges and future research directions toward standardized, safety-aware, and hardware-conscious evaluation of efficient autonomous driving systems.

light_analysis.overview: 综述Transformer在自动驾驶中的应用及部署导向的压缩策略，强调系统级设计考量。
light_analysis.motivation: Transformer模型在自动驾驶中因捕捉长程依赖和多模态上下文而成为核心范式，但其高计算开销阻碍了实际部署。现有方法多将压缩视为后处理步骤，缺乏从部署角度对模型设计进行系统性审视。本文旨在填补这一空白，通过综述部署导向的压缩技术，推动高效、安全、鲁棒的自动驾驶系统发展。
light_analysis.method: 本文首先分类综述了基于Transformer的自动驾驶模型，按任务角色、感知配置和架构设计组织。随后从部署视角分析效率约束如何重塑模型设计，并系统回顾了量化、剪枝、知识蒸馏、低秩近似和高效注意力等压缩加速策略，讨论其优缺点及任务依赖性。强调压缩作为系统级设计考量，直接影响可部署性、鲁棒性和安全性。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确给出具体实验结果，但综述性论文通过对现有方法的比较分析，揭示了压缩策略在减少延迟、内存和能耗方面的有效性，并指出不同任务对压缩方法的适用性差异。例如，量化可降低模型大小，知识蒸馏能保持高精度，但需权衡安全性与效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文突出了部署导向的视角，将压缩视为系统级设计而非后处理，为自动驾驶中Transformer的高效部署提供了全面指导。未来方向包括标准化、安全感知和硬件感知的评估体系，以推动该领域实用化。
